1394	/********************************************************************
1395	 * Connect all the memory modules under the parent module in a chain
1396	 *
1397	 *  Region 0:
1398	 *                   +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1399	 *  ccff_head[0] --->| Memory |--->| Memory |--->... --->| Memory |---->
1400	 *ccff_tail[0] | Module |    | Module |            | Module | |   [0]  |    |
1401	 *[1]  |            |  [N-1] |
1402	 *                   +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1403	 *
1404	 *  Region 1:
1405	 *                   +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1406	 *  ccff_head[1] --->| Memory |--->| Memory |--->... --->| Memory |---->
1407	 *ccff_tail[1] | Module |    | Module |            | Module | |   [0]  |    |
1408	 *[1]  |            |  [N-1] |
1409	 *                   +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1410	 *
1411	 *  For the 1st memory module:
1412	 *    net source is the configuration chain head of the primitive module
1413	 *    net sink is the configuration chain head of the next memory module
1414	 *
1415	 *  For the rest of memory modules:
1416	 *    net source is the configuration chain tail of the previous memory module
1417	 *    net sink is the configuration chain head of the next memory module
1418	 *********************************************************************/
1419	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_chain_config_bus(
1420	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& parent_module,
1421	  const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol) {
1422	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1423	       module_manager.regions(parent_module)) {
1424	    for (size_t mem_index = 0; mem_index < module_manager
1425	                                             .region_configurable_children(
1426	                                               parent_module, config_region)
1427	                                             .size();
1428	         ++mem_index) {
1429	      ModuleId net_src_module_id;
1430	      size_t net_src_instance_id;
1431	      ModulePortId net_src_port_id;
1432	      size_t net_src_pin_id;
1433	
1434	      ModuleId net_sink_module_id;
1435	      size_t net_sink_instance_id;
1436	      ModulePortId net_sink_port_id;
1437	      size_t net_sink_pin_id;
1438	
1439	      if (0 == mem_index) {
1440	        /* Find the port name of configuration chain head */
1441	        std::string src_port_name = generate_sram_port_name(
1442	          config_protocol.type(), CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_INPUT);
1443	        net_src_module_id = parent_module;
1444	        net_src_instance_id = 0;
1445	        net_src_port_id =
1446	          module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
1447	        net_src_pin_id = size_t(config_region);
1448	
1449	        /* Find the port name of next memory module */
1450	        std::string sink_port_name = generate_configuration_chain_head_name();
1451	        net_sink_module_id = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1452	          parent_module, config_region)[mem_index];
1453	        net_sink_instance_id =
1454	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1455	            parent_module, config_region)[mem_index];
1456	        net_sink_port_id =
1457	          module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
1458	        net_sink_pin_id = 0;
1459	      } else {
1460	        /* Find the port name of previous memory module */
1461	        std::string src_port_name = generate_configuration_chain_tail_name();
1462	        net_src_module_id = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1463	          parent_module, config_region)[mem_index - 1];
1464	        net_src_instance_id =
1465	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1466	            parent_module, config_region)[mem_index - 1];
1467	        net_src_port_id =
1468	          module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
1469	        net_src_pin_id = 0;
1470	
1471	        /* Find the port name of next memory module */
1472	        std::string sink_port_name = generate_configuration_chain_head_name();
1473	        net_sink_module_id = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1474	          parent_module, config_region)[mem_index];
1475	        net_sink_instance_id =
1476	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1477	            parent_module, config_region)[mem_index];
1478	        net_sink_port_id =
1479	          module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
1480	        net_sink_pin_id = 0;
1481	      }
1482	
1483	      /* Get the pin id for source port */
1484	      BasicPort net_src_port =
1485	        module_manager.module_port(net_src_module_id, net_src_port_id);
1486	      /* Get the pin id for sink port */
1487	      BasicPort net_sink_port =
1488	        module_manager.module_port(net_sink_module_id, net_sink_port_id);
1489	
1490	      VTR_ASSERT(net_src_pin_id < net_src_port.get_width());
1491	      VTR_ASSERT(net_sink_pin_id < net_sink_port.get_width());
1492	
1493	      /* Create a net and add source and sink to it */
1494	      ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1495	        module_manager, parent_module, net_src_module_id, net_src_instance_id,
1496	        net_src_port_id, net_src_port.pins()[net_src_pin_id]);
1497	      /* Add net sink */
1498	      module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, net, net_sink_module_id,
1499	                                         net_sink_instance_id, net_sink_port_id,
1500	                                         net_sink_port.pins()[net_sink_pin_id]);
1501	    }
1502	
1503	    /* For the last memory module:
1504	     *    net source is the configuration chain tail of the previous memory
1505	     * module net sink is the configuration chain tail of the primitive module
1506	     */
1507	    /* Find the port name of previous memory module */
1508	    std::string src_port_name = generate_configuration_chain_tail_name();
1509	    ModuleId net_src_module_id =
1510	      module_manager.region_configurable_children(parent_module, config_region)
1511	        .back();
1512	    size_t net_src_instance_id =
1513	      module_manager
1514	        .region_configurable_child_instances(parent_module, config_region)
1515	        .back();
1516	    ModulePortId net_src_port_id =
1517	      module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
1518	    size_t net_src_pin_id = 0;
1519	
1520	    /* Find the port name of next memory module */
1521	    std::string sink_port_name = generate_sram_port_name(
1522	      config_protocol.type(), CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_OUTPUT);
1523	    ModuleId net_sink_module_id = parent_module;
1524	    size_t net_sink_instance_id = 0;
1525	    ModulePortId net_sink_port_id =
1526	      module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
1527	    size_t net_sink_pin_id = size_t(config_region);
1528	
1529	    /* Get the pin id for source port */
1530	    BasicPort net_src_port =
1531	      module_manager.module_port(net_src_module_id, net_src_port_id);
1532	    /* Get the pin id for sink port */
1533	    BasicPort net_sink_port =
1534	      module_manager.module_port(net_sink_module_id, net_sink_port_id);
1535	
1536	    VTR_ASSERT(net_src_pin_id < net_src_port.get_width());
1537	    VTR_ASSERT(net_sink_pin_id < net_sink_port.get_width());
1538	
1539	    /* Create a net and add source and sink to it */
1540	    ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1541	      module_manager, parent_module, net_src_module_id, net_src_instance_id,
1542	      net_src_port_id, net_src_port.pins()[net_src_pin_id]);
1543	    /* Add net sink */
1544	    module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, net, net_sink_module_id,
1545	                                       net_sink_instance_id, net_sink_port_id,
1546	                                       net_sink_port.pins()[net_sink_pin_id]);
1547	  }
1548	}
1549	
1550	/********************************************************************
1551	 * This function will create nets for the following types of connections:
1552	 *  - Connect the enable signal to the EN of memory module
1553	 *  - Connect the address port to the address port of memory module
1554	 *  - Connect the data_in (Din) to the data_in of the memory module
1555	 *    Note that the top-level module may have multiple regions and
1556	 *    therefore the Din port have multiple pins. The Din of local decoder
1557	 *    should be connected the Din pin indexed by current configuration region
1558	 *
1559	 *       EN  ADDR[X-1:0] DATA_IN[N-1:0]
1560	 *        |     |            |
1561	 *        |     |            |     Top module
1562	 *   +----+-----+------------+------------------
1563	 *   |    |     |            |
1564	 *   |    v     v            v
1565	 *   | +-------------------------------+
1566	 *   | | EN ADDR[X-1:0] DATA_IN[N-1:0] |
1567	 *   | |                               |
1568	 *   | |    Configurable Child         |
1569	 *   | |                               |
1570	 *   | +-------------------------------+
1571	 *
1572	 * Note:
1573	 *  - This function is ONLY applicable to single configurable child case!!!
1574	 *  - This function is applicable to the configurable child in a specific
1575	 *region!!!
1576	 *********************************************************************/
1577	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_short_config_bus(
1578	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1579	  const ConfigRegionId& config_region) {
1580	  std::vector<ModuleId> configurable_children =
1581	    module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region);
1582	
1583	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == configurable_children.size());
1584	  ModuleId child_module = configurable_children[0];
1585	  size_t child_instance = module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1586	    top_module, config_region)[0];
1587	
1588	  /* Connect the enable (EN) port of the parent module
1589	   * to the EN port of memory module
1590	   */
1591	  ModulePortId parent_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1592	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
1593	  ModulePortId child_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1594	    child_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
1595	  add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, parent_en_port,
1596	                      child_module, child_instance, child_en_port);
1597	
1598	  /* Connect the address port of the parent module to the child module address
1599	   * port */
1600	  ModulePortId parent_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1601	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1602	  ModulePortId child_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1603	    child_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1604	  add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0,
1605	                      parent_addr_port, child_module, child_instance,
1606	                      child_addr_port);
1607	
1608	  /* Connect the data_in (Din) of parent module to the data_in of the memory
1609	   * module
1610	   */
1611	  ModulePortId parent_din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1612	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
1613	  BasicPort parent_din_port_info =
1614	    module_manager.module_port(top_module, parent_din_port);
1615	  ModulePortId child_din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1616	    child_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
1617	  BasicPort child_din_port_info =
1618	    module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_din_port);
1619	
1620	  /* Ensure pin indices are in range! */
1621	  VTR_ASSERT(size_t(config_region) < parent_din_port_info.get_width());
1622	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == child_din_port_info.get_width());
1623	
1624	  /* Create a net for the Din[config_region] pin */
1625	  ModuleNetId din_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1626	    module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, parent_din_port,
1627	    parent_din_port_info.pins()[size_t(config_region)]);
1628	  VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != din_net);
1629	
1630	  /* Configure the net sink */
1631	  module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, din_net, child_module,
1632	                                     child_instance, child_din_port,
1633	                                     child_din_port_info.pins()[0]);
1634	}
1635	
1636	/********************************************************************
1637	 * This function will
1638	 * - Add a frame decoder to the parent module
1639	 *   - If the decoder exists in the library, we use the module
1640	 *   - If the decoder does not exist, we create a new module and use it
1641	 * - Create nets for the following types of connections:
1642	 *   - Connect the EN signal, first few bits of address of parent module
1643	 *     to the frame decoder inputs
1644	 *     Note that the top-level module may have more address bits than
1645	 *     what is required for this configuration region.
1646	 *     A decoder will be created anyway to avoid address collision
1647	 *     to other configuration regions
1648	 *     The address lines will be aligned from the MSB of top-level address
1649	 *lines!!!
1650	 *   - Connect the enable (EN) port of memory modules under the parent module
1651	 *     to the frame decoder outputs
1652	 *   - Connect the data_in (Din) of parent module to the data_in of the all
1653	 *     the memory modules
1654	 *     Note that the top-level module may have multiple regions and
1655	 *     therefore the Din port have multiple pins. The Din of local decoder
1656	 *     should be connected the Din pin indexed by current configuration region
1657	 *
1658	 *           EN  ADDR[X-1:0] DATA_IN[Y-1:0]
1659	 *            |       |            |
1660	 *            |       |            |     Top module
1661	 *   +--------+-------+------------+------------------
1662	 *   |        |       |
1663	 *   |        v       v
1664	 *   |       EN      ADDR[X - 1: X - log(N)/log2]
1665	 *   |        |        |
1666	 *   |        v        v
1667	 *   |  +--------------------------------------------+
1668	 *   |  |             Frame-based decoder            |
1669	 *   |  |                                            |
1670	 *   |  |                Data out                    |
1671	 *   |  +--------------------------------------------+
1672	 *   |                     |
1673	 *   |       +-------------+--------------------+
1674	 *   |       |             |                    |
1675	 *   |   Din |         Din |                Din |
1676	 *   |   [Y] |         [Y] |                [Y] |
1677	 *   |    |  |          |  |                 |  |
1678	 *   |    v  v          v  v                 v  v
1679	 *   |  +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1680	 *   |  | Memory |    | Memory |    ...     | Memory |
1681	 *   |  | Module |    | Module |            | Module |
1682	 *   |  |   [0]  |    |   [1]  |            |  [N-1] |
1683	 *   |  +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
1684	 *   |       ^             ^                    ^
1685	 *   |       |             |                    |
1686	 *   |       +-------------+--------------------+
1687	 *   |                     |
1688	 *   |                  ADDR[log(N)/log2 - 1: 0]
1689	 *
1690	 * Note:
1691	 *  - X is the port size of address port of the parent module
1692	 *  - the address port of child memory modules may be smaller than
1693	 *    X - log(N)/log2. In such case, we will drop the MSBs until it fit
1694	 *********************************************************************/
1695	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_decoder_config_bus(
1696	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
1697	  const ModuleId& parent_module, const ConfigRegionId& config_region) {
1698	  std::vector<ModuleId> configurable_children =
1699	    module_manager.region_configurable_children(parent_module, config_region);
1700	  std::vector<size_t> configurable_child_instances =
1701	    module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(parent_module,
1702	                                                       config_region);
1703	
1704	  ModulePortId parent_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1705	    parent_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1706	  BasicPort parent_addr_port_info =
1707	    module_manager.module_port(parent_module, parent_addr_port);
1708	
1709	  /* Find the decoder specification */
1710	  size_t addr_size =
1711	    find_mux_local_decoder_addr_size(configurable_children.size());
1712	  /* Data input should match the WL (data_in) of a SRAM */
1713	  size_t data_size = configurable_children.size();
1714	
1715	  /* Search the decoder library and try to find one
1716	   * If not found, create a new module and add it to the module manager
1717	   */
1718	  DecoderId decoder_id =
1719	    decoder_lib.find_decoder(addr_size, data_size, true, false, false, false);
1720	  if (DecoderId::INVALID() == decoder_id) {
1721	    decoder_id =
1722	      decoder_lib.add_decoder(addr_size, data_size, true, false, false, false);
1723	  }
1724	  VTR_ASSERT(DecoderId::INVALID() != decoder_id);
1725	
1726	  /* Create a module if not existed yet */
1727	  std::string decoder_module_name =
1728	    generate_memory_decoder_subckt_name(addr_size, data_size);
1729	  ModuleId decoder_module = module_manager.find_module(decoder_module_name);
1730	  if (ModuleId::INVALID() == decoder_module) {
1731	    decoder_module = build_frame_memory_decoder_module(module_manager,
1732	                                                       decoder_lib, decoder_id);
1733	  }
1734	  VTR_ASSERT(ModuleId::INVALID() != decoder_module);
1735	
1736	  /* Instanciate the decoder module here */
1737	  size_t decoder_instance =
1738	    module_manager.num_instance(parent_module, decoder_module);
1739	  module_manager.add_child_module(parent_module, decoder_module, false);
1740	
1741	  /* Connect the enable (EN) port of memory modules under the parent module
1742	   * to the frame decoder inputs
1743	   */
1744	  ModulePortId parent_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1745	    parent_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
1746	  ModulePortId decoder_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1747	    decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
1748	  add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, parent_module, parent_module, 0,
1749	                      parent_en_port, decoder_module, decoder_instance,
1750	                      decoder_en_port);
1751	
1752	  /* Connect the address port of the parent module to the frame decoder address
1753	   * port Note that we only connect to the first few bits of address port
1754	   */
1755	  ModulePortId decoder_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1756	    decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1757	  BasicPort decoder_addr_port_info =
1758	    module_manager.module_port(decoder_module, decoder_addr_port);
1759	  for (size_t ipin = 0; ipin < decoder_addr_port_info.get_width(); ++ipin) {
1760	    /* Create a net for the addr pin */
1761	    ModuleNetId addr_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1762	      module_manager, parent_module, parent_module, 0, parent_addr_port,
1763	      parent_addr_port_info
1764	        .pins()[parent_addr_port_info.get_width() - 1 - ipin]);
1765	    VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != addr_net);
1766	
1767	    /* Configure the net sink */
1768	    module_manager.add_module_net_sink(
1769	      parent_module, addr_net, decoder_module, decoder_instance,
1770	      decoder_addr_port,
1771	      decoder_addr_port_info
1772	        .pins()[decoder_addr_port_info.get_width() - 1 - ipin]);
1773	  }
1774	
1775	  /* Connect the address port of the parent module to the address port of
1776	   * configurable children Note that we only connect to the last few bits of
1777	   * address port
1778	   */
1779	  for (size_t mem_index = 0; mem_index < configurable_children.size();
1780	       ++mem_index) {
1781	    ModuleId child_module = configurable_children[mem_index];
1782	    size_t child_instance = configurable_child_instances[mem_index];
1783	    ModulePortId child_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1784	      child_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1785	    BasicPort child_addr_port_info =
1786	      module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_addr_port);
1787	    for (size_t ipin = 0; ipin < child_addr_port_info.get_width(); ++ipin) {
1788	      ModuleNetId addr_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1789	        module_manager, parent_module, parent_module, 0, parent_addr_port,
1790	        parent_addr_port_info.pins()[ipin]);
1791	      VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != addr_net);
1792	
1793	      /* Configure the net sink */
1794	      module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, addr_net, child_module,
1795	                                         child_instance, child_addr_port,
1796	                                         child_addr_port_info.pins()[ipin]);
1797	    }
1798	  }
1799	
1800	  /* Connect the data_in (Din) of parent module to the data_in of the all
1801	   * the memory modules
1802	   */
1803	  ModulePortId parent_din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1804	    parent_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
1805	  BasicPort parent_din_port_info =
1806	    module_manager.module_port(parent_module, parent_din_port);
1807	  for (size_t mem_index = 0; mem_index < configurable_children.size();
1808	       ++mem_index) {
1809	    ModuleId child_module = configurable_children[mem_index];
1810	    size_t child_instance = module_manager.configurable_child_instances(
1811	      parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
1812	    ModulePortId child_din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1813	      child_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
1814	    BasicPort child_din_port_info =
1815	      module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_din_port);
1816	
1817	    /* Ensure pin indices are in range! */
1818	    VTR_ASSERT(size_t(config_region) < parent_din_port_info.get_width());
1819	    VTR_ASSERT(1 == child_din_port_info.get_width());
1820	
1821	    /* Create a net for the Din[config_region] pin */
1822	    ModuleNetId din_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1823	      module_manager, parent_module, parent_module, 0, parent_din_port,
1824	      parent_din_port_info.pins()[size_t(config_region)]);
1825	    VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != din_net);
1826	
1827	    /* Configure the net sink */
1828	    module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, din_net, child_module,
1829	                                       child_instance, child_din_port,
1830	                                       child_din_port_info.pins()[0]);
1831	  }
1832	
1833	  /* Connect the data_out port of the decoder module
1834	   * to the enable port of configurable children
1835	   */
1836	  ModulePortId decoder_dout_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1837	    decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_OUT_PORT_NAME));
1838	  BasicPort decoder_dout_port_info =
1839	    module_manager.module_port(decoder_module, decoder_dout_port);
1840	  VTR_ASSERT(decoder_dout_port_info.get_width() ==
1841	             configurable_children.size());
1842	  for (size_t mem_index = 0; mem_index < configurable_children.size();
1843	       ++mem_index) {
1844	    ModuleId child_module = configurable_children[mem_index];
1845	    size_t child_instance = module_manager.configurable_child_instances(
1846	      parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
1847	    ModulePortId child_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1848	      child_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
1849	    BasicPort child_en_port_info =
1850	      module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_en_port);
1851	    for (size_t ipin = 0; ipin < child_en_port_info.get_width(); ++ipin) {
1852	      ModuleNetId en_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1853	        module_manager, parent_module, decoder_module, decoder_instance,
1854	        decoder_dout_port, decoder_dout_port_info.pins()[mem_index]);
1855	      VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != en_net);
1856	
1857	      /* Configure the net sink */
1858	      module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, en_net, child_module,
1859	                                         child_instance, child_en_port,
1860	                                         child_en_port_info.pins()[ipin]);
1861	    }
1862	  }
1863	
1864	  /* Add the decoder as the last configurable children */
1865	  module_manager.add_configurable_child(
1866	    parent_module, decoder_module, decoder_instance,
1867	    ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL);
1868	  /* Register the configurable child to configuration region */
1869	  module_manager.add_configurable_child_to_region(
1870	    parent_module, config_region, decoder_module, decoder_instance,
1871	    module_manager
1872	        .configurable_children(parent_module,
1873	                               ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
1874	        .size() -
1875	      1);
1876	}
1877	
1878	/*********************************************************************
1879	 * Add framed-based decoders to the top-level module
1880	 * and build net connections between decoders and subblocks
1881	 *
1882	 * For each configuration region, we create an independent decoder
1883	 * Note that to avoid parasitic programming, all the decoders will
1884	 * be in the same size, sharing the same principle as memory banks
1885	 *
1886	 * For each region, decoder and net addition will depend on the following cases:
1887	 * - If there is no configurable child, nothing to do.
1888	 * - If there is only one configurable child, short wire the EN, ADDR and
1889	 *DATA_IN to it
1890	 * - If there are more than two configurable childern, add a decoder and build
1891	 *interconnection between it and the children
1892	 **********************************************************************/
1893	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_config_bus(
1894	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
1895	  const ModuleId& top_module, const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
1896	  /* Find the number of address bits for the top-level module */
1897	  ModulePortId top_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1898	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
1899	  BasicPort top_addr_port_info =
1900	    module_manager.module_port(top_module, top_addr_port);
1901	  size_t top_addr_size = top_addr_port_info.get_width();
1902	
1903	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1904	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1905	    if (0 ==
1906	        module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1907	          .size()) {
1908	      continue;
1909	    }
1910	
1911	    /* Short-wiring is applicable only when all the following situations are
1912	     * met:
1913	     * - There is only 1 configurable child in the region
1914	     * - The number of address bits of the configurable child is the same as
1915	     * top-level
1916	     */
1917	    if ((1 ==
1918	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1919	           .size()) &&
1920	        (num_config_bits[config_region].first == top_addr_size)) {
1921	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_short_config_bus(
1922	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
1923	    } else {
1924	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_decoder_config_bus(
1925	        module_manager, decoder_lib, top_module, config_region);
1926	    }
1927	  }
1928	}
1929	
1930	/*********************************************************************
1931	 * Add the port-to-port connection between all the memory modules
1932	 * and their parent module
1933	 *
1934	 * Create nets to wire the control signals of memory module to
1935	 *    the configuration ports of primitive module
1936	 *
1937	 * Configuration Chain
1938	 * -------------------
1939	 *
1940	 *        config_bus (head)   config_bus (tail)
1941	 *            |                   ^
1942	 * primitive  |                   |
1943	 *   +---------------------------------------------+
1944	 *   |        |                   |                |
1945	 *   |        v                   |                |
1946	 *   |  +-------------------------------------+    |
1947	 *   |  |        CMOS-based Memory Modules    |    |
1948	 *   |  +-------------------------------------+    |
1949	 *   |        |                   |                |
1950	 *   |        v                   v                |
1951	 *   |     sram_out             sram_outb          |
1952	 *   |                                             |
1953	 *   +---------------------------------------------+
1954	 *
1955	 * Memory bank
1956	 * -----------
1957	 *
1958	 *        config_bus (BL)   config_bus (WL)
1959	 *            |                   |
1960	 * primitive  |                   |
1961	 *   +---------------------------------------------+
1962	 *   |        |                   |                |
1963	 *   |        v                   v                |
1964	 *   |  +-------------------------------------+    |
1965	 *   |  |        CMOS-based Memory Modules    |    |
1966	 *   |  +-------------------------------------+    |
1967	 *   |        |                   |                |
1968	 *   |        v                   v                |
1969	 *   |     sram_out             sram_outb          |
1970	 *   |                                             |
1971	 *   +---------------------------------------------+
1972	 *
1973	 **********************************************************************/
1974	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_config_bus(
1975	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
1976	  MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& blwl_sr_banks, const ModuleId& parent_module,
1977	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol,
1978	  const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
1979	  switch (config_protocol.type()) {
1980	    case CONFIG_MEM_STANDALONE:
1981	      add_module_nets_cmos_flatten_memory_config_bus(
1982	        module_manager, parent_module, config_protocol.type(),
1983	        CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_BL, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL);
1984	      add_module_nets_cmos_flatten_memory_config_bus(
1985	        module_manager, parent_module, config_protocol.type(),
1986	        CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_WL, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL);
1987	      break;
1988	    case CONFIG_MEM_SCAN_CHAIN: {
1989	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_chain_config_bus(
1990	        module_manager, parent_module, config_protocol);
1991	      break;
1992	    }
1993	    case CONFIG_MEM_MEMORY_BANK:
1994	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_bank_config_bus(
1995	        module_manager, decoder_lib, parent_module, num_config_bits);
1996	      break;
1997	    case CONFIG_MEM_QL_MEMORY_BANK:
1998	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_config_bus(
1999	        module_manager, decoder_lib, blwl_sr_banks, parent_module, circuit_lib,
2000	        config_protocol, num_config_bits);
2001	      break;
2002	    case CONFIG_MEM_FRAME_BASED:
2003	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_frame_config_bus(
2004	        module_manager, decoder_lib, parent_module, num_config_bits);
2005	      break;
2006	    default:
2007	      VTR_LOGF_ERROR(__FILE__, __LINE__,
2008	                     "Invalid type of SRAM organization!\n");
2009	      exit(1);
2010	  }
2011	}
2012	
2013	/********************************************************************
2014	 * TODO:
2015	 * Add the port-to-port connection between a memory module
2016	 * and the configuration bus of a primitive module
2017	 *
2018	 * Create nets to wire the control signals of memory module to
2019	 *    the configuration ports of primitive module
2020	 *
2021	 *              Primitive module
2022	 *             +----------------------------+
2023	 *             |                +--------+  |
2024	 *  config     |                |        |  |
2025	 *   ports --->|--------------->| Memory |  |
2026	 *             |                | Module |  |
2027	 *             |                |        |  |
2028	 *             |                +--------+  |
2029	 *             +----------------------------+
2030	 *     The detailed config ports really depend on the type
2031	 *     of SRAM organization.
2032	 *
2033	 * The config_bus in the argument is the reserved address of configuration
2034	 * bus in the parent_module for this memory module
2035	 *
2036	 * The configuration bus connection will depend not only
2037	 * the design technology of the memory cells but also the
2038	 * configuration styles of FPGA fabric.
2039	 * Here we will branch on the design technology
2040	 *
2041	 * Note: this function SHOULD be called after the pb_type_module is created
2042	 * and its child module (logic_module and memory_module) is created!
2043	 *******************************************************************/
2044	void add_top_module_nets_memory_config_bus(
2045	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
2046	  MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& blwl_sr_banks, const ModuleId& parent_module,
2047	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol,
2048	  const e_circuit_model_design_tech& mem_tech,
2049	  const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
2050	  vtr::ScopedStartFinishTimer timer("Add module nets for configuration buses");
2051	
2052	  switch (mem_tech) {
2053	    case CIRCUIT_MODEL_DESIGN_CMOS:
2054	      add_top_module_nets_cmos_memory_config_bus(
2055	        module_manager, decoder_lib, blwl_sr_banks, parent_module, circuit_lib,
2056	        config_protocol, num_config_bits);
2057	      break;
2058	    case CIRCUIT_MODEL_DESIGN_RRAM:
2059	      /* TODO: */
2060	      break;
2061	    default:
2062	      VTR_LOGF_ERROR(__FILE__, __LINE__,
2063	                     "Invalid type of memory design technology!\n");
2064	      exit(1);
2065	  }
2066	}
2067	
2068	} /* end namespace openfpga */

1	/********************************************************************
2	 * This file includes functions that are used to organize memories
3	 * in the top module of FPGA fabric
4	 *******************************************************************/
5	#include <cmath>
6	#include <limits>
7	
8	/* Headers from vtrutil library */
9	#include "vtr_assert.h"
10	#include "vtr_log.h"
11	#include "vtr_time.h"
12	
13	/* Headers from vpr library */
14	#include "vpr_utils.h"
15	
16	/* Headers from openfpgashell library */
17	#include "build_decoder_modules.h"
18	#include "build_memory_modules.h"
19	#include "build_top_module_memory_bank.h"
20	#include "command_exit_codes.h"
21	#include "decoder_library_utils.h"
22	#include "memory_bank_shift_register_banks.h"
23	#include "memory_bank_utils.h"
24	#include "memory_utils.h"
25	#include "module_manager_utils.h"
26	#include "openfpga_naming.h"
27	#include "openfpga_reserved_words.h"
28	#include "rr_gsb_utils.h"
29	
30	/* begin namespace openfpga */
31	namespace openfpga {
32	
33	/********************************************************************
34	 * Connect all the memory modules under the parent module in a chain
35	 *
36	 *                +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
37	 *  ccff_head --->| Memory |--->| Memory |--->... --->| Memory |----> ccff_tail
38	 *                | Module |    | Module |            | Module |
39	 *                |   [0]  |    |   [1]  |            |  [N-1] |
40	 *                +--------+    +--------+            +--------+
41	 *  For the 1st memory module:
42	 *    net source is the configuration chain head of the primitive module
43	 *    net sink is the configuration chain head of the next memory module
44	 *
45	 *  For the rest of memory modules:
46	 *    net source is the configuration chain tail of the previous memory module
47	 *    net sink is the configuration chain head of the next memory module
48	 *
49	 *  Note that:
50	 *    This function is designed for memory modules ONLY!
51	 *    Do not use it to replace the
52	 *      add_module_nets_cmos_memory_chain_config_bus() !!!
53	 *********************************************************************/
54	static void add_module_nets_to_ql_memory_bank_shift_register_module(
55	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& parent_module,
56	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const CircuitPortId& model_input_port,
57	  const CircuitPortId& model_output_port,
58	  const std::string& chain_head_port_name,
59	  const std::string& chain_tail_port_name) {
60	  for (size_t mem_index = 0;
61	       mem_index <
62	       module_manager
63	         .configurable_children(parent_module,
64	                                ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
65	         .size();
66	       ++mem_index) {
67	    ModuleId net_src_module_id;
68	    size_t net_src_instance_id;
69	    ModulePortId net_src_port_id;
70	
71	    ModuleId net_sink_module_id;
72	    size_t net_sink_instance_id;
73	    ModulePortId net_sink_port_id;
74	
75	    if (0 == mem_index) {
76	      /* Find the port name of configuration chain head */
77	      std::string src_port_name = chain_head_port_name;
78	      net_src_module_id = parent_module;
79	      net_src_instance_id = 0;
80	      net_src_port_id =
81	        module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
82	
83	      /* Find the port name of next memory module */
84	      std::string sink_port_name = circuit_lib.port_prefix(model_input_port);
85	      net_sink_module_id = module_manager.configurable_children(
86	        parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
87	      net_sink_instance_id = module_manager.configurable_child_instances(
88	        parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
89	      net_sink_port_id =
90	        module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
91	    } else {
92	      /* Find the port name of previous memory module */
93	      std::string src_port_name = circuit_lib.port_prefix(model_output_port);
94	      net_src_module_id = module_manager.configurable_children(
95	        parent_module,
96	        ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index - 1];
97	      net_src_instance_id = module_manager.configurable_child_instances(
98	        parent_module,
99	        ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index - 1];
100	      net_src_port_id =
101	        module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
102	
103	      /* Find the port name of next memory module */
104	      std::string sink_port_name = circuit_lib.port_prefix(model_input_port);
105	      net_sink_module_id = module_manager.configurable_children(
106	        parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
107	      net_sink_instance_id = module_manager.configurable_child_instances(
108	        parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)[mem_index];
109	      net_sink_port_id =
110	        module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
111	    }
112	
113	    /* Get the pin id for source port */
114	    BasicPort net_src_port =
115	      module_manager.module_port(net_src_module_id, net_src_port_id);
116	    /* Get the pin id for sink port */
117	    BasicPort net_sink_port =
118	      module_manager.module_port(net_sink_module_id, net_sink_port_id);
119	    /* Port sizes of source and sink should match */
120	    VTR_ASSERT(net_src_port.get_width() == net_sink_port.get_width());
121	
122	    /* Create a net for each pin */
123	    for (size_t pin_id = 0; pin_id < net_src_port.pins().size(); ++pin_id) {
124	      /* Create a net and add source and sink to it */
125	      ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
126	        module_manager, parent_module, net_src_module_id, net_src_instance_id,
127	        net_src_port_id, net_src_port.pins()[pin_id]);
128	      /* Add net sink */
129	      module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, net, net_sink_module_id,
130	                                         net_sink_instance_id, net_sink_port_id,
131	                                         net_sink_port.pins()[pin_id]);
132	    }
133	  }
134	
135	  /* For the last memory module:
136	   *    net source is the configuration chain tail of the previous memory module
137	   *    net sink is the configuration chain tail of the primitive module
138	   */
139	  /* Find the port name of previous memory module */
140	  std::string src_port_name = circuit_lib.port_prefix(model_output_port);
141	  ModuleId net_src_module_id =
142	    module_manager
143	      .configurable_children(parent_module,
144	                             ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
145	      .back();
146	  size_t net_src_instance_id =
147	    module_manager
148	      .configurable_child_instances(
149	        parent_module, ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
150	      .back();
151	  ModulePortId net_src_port_id =
152	    module_manager.find_module_port(net_src_module_id, src_port_name);
153	
154	  /* Find the port name of next memory module */
155	  std::string sink_port_name = chain_tail_port_name;
156	  ModuleId net_sink_module_id = parent_module;
157	  size_t net_sink_instance_id = 0;
158	  ModulePortId net_sink_port_id =
159	    module_manager.find_module_port(net_sink_module_id, sink_port_name);
160	
161	  /* Get the pin id for source port */
162	  BasicPort net_src_port =
163	    module_manager.module_port(net_src_module_id, net_src_port_id);
164	  /* Get the pin id for sink port */
165	  BasicPort net_sink_port =
166	    module_manager.module_port(net_sink_module_id, net_sink_port_id);
167	  /* Port sizes of source and sink should match */
168	  VTR_ASSERT(net_src_port.get_width() == net_sink_port.get_width());
169	
170	  /* Create a net for each pin */
171	  for (size_t pin_id = 0; pin_id < net_src_port.pins().size(); ++pin_id) {
172	    /* Create a net and add source and sink to it */
173	    ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
174	      module_manager, parent_module, net_src_module_id, net_src_instance_id,
175	      net_src_port_id, net_src_port.pins()[pin_id]);
176	    /* Add net sink */
177	    module_manager.add_module_net_sink(parent_module, net, net_sink_module_id,
178	                                       net_sink_instance_id, net_sink_port_id,
179	                                       net_sink_port.pins()[pin_id]);
180	  }
181	}

183	/*********************************************************************
184	 * BL shift register chain module organization
185	 *
186	 *                +-------+    +-------+            +-------+
187	 *    chain   --->| CCFF  |--->| CCFF  |--->... --->| CCFF  |---->chain
188	 *  input&clock   |  [0]  |    |  [1]  |            | [N-1] |     output
189	 *                +-------+    +-------+            +-------+
190	 *                    |            |      ...           | config-memory output
191	 *                    v            v                    v
192	 *                +-----------------------------------------+
193	 *                |   BLs of configurable modules           |
194	 *
195	 ********************************************************************/
196	static ModuleId build_bl_shift_register_chain_module(
197	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
198	  const std::string& module_name, const CircuitModelId& sram_model,
199	  const size_t& num_mems) {
200	  /* Get the input ports from the SRAM */
201	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_input_ports =
202	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_INPUT, true);
203	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_input_ports.size());
204	
205	  /* Get the output ports from the SRAM */
206	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_output_ports =
207	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_OUTPUT,
208	                                    true);
209	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_output_ports.size());
210	
211	  /* Get the BL ports from the SRAM */
212	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_bl_ports =
213	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_BL, true);
214	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_bl_ports.size());
215	
216	  /* Create a module and add to the module manager */
217	  ModuleId mem_module = module_manager.add_module(module_name);
218	  VTR_ASSERT(true == module_manager.valid_module_id(mem_module));
219	
220	  /* Label module usage */
221	  module_manager.set_module_usage(mem_module, ModuleManager::MODULE_CONFIG);
222	
223	  /* Add an input port, which is the head of configuration chain in the module
224	   */
225	  /* TODO: restriction!!!
226	   * consider only the first input of the CCFF model as the D port,
227	   * which will be connected to the head of the chain
228	   */
229	  BasicPort chain_head_port(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME,
230	                            circuit_lib.port_size(sram_input_ports[0]));
231	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_head_port,
232	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
233	
234	  /* Add an output port, which is the tail of configuration chain in the module
235	   */
236	  /* TODO: restriction!!!
237	   * consider only the first output of the CCFF model as the Q port,
238	   * which will be connected to the tail of the chain
239	   */
240	  BasicPort chain_tail_port(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_TAIL_NAME,
241	                            circuit_lib.port_size(sram_output_ports[0]));
242	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_tail_port,
243	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);
244	
245	  /* Add the output ports to output BL signals */
246	  BasicPort chain_bl_port(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_BL_OUT_NAME, num_mems);
247	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_bl_port,
248	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);
249	
250	  /* Find the sram module in the module manager */
251	  ModuleId sram_mem_module =
252	    module_manager.find_module(circuit_lib.model_name(sram_model));
253	
254	  /* Instanciate each submodule */
255	  for (size_t i = 0; i < num_mems; ++i) {
256	    size_t sram_mem_instance =
257	      module_manager.num_instance(mem_module, sram_mem_module);
258	    module_manager.add_child_module(mem_module, sram_mem_module);
259	    module_manager.add_configurable_child(
260	      mem_module, sram_mem_module, sram_mem_instance,
261	      ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::UNIFIED);
262	
263	    /* Build module nets to wire bl outputs of sram modules to BL outputs of
264	     * memory module */
265	    for (const auto& child_module_output_port : sram_bl_ports) {
266	      std::string chain_output_port_name =
267	        std::string(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_BL_OUT_NAME);
268	      add_module_output_nets_to_chain_mem_modules(
269	        module_manager, mem_module, chain_output_port_name, circuit_lib,
270	        child_module_output_port, sram_mem_module, i, sram_mem_instance);
271	    }
272	  }
273	
274	  /* Build module nets to wire the configuration chain */
275	  add_module_nets_to_ql_memory_bank_shift_register_module(
276	    module_manager, mem_module, circuit_lib, sram_input_ports[0],
277	    sram_output_ports[0], std::string(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME),
278	    std::string(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_TAIL_NAME));
279	
280	  /* Add global ports to the pb_module:
281	   * This is a much easier job after adding sub modules (instances),
282	   * we just need to find all the global ports from the child modules and build
283	   * a list of it
284	   */
285	  add_module_global_ports_from_child_modules(module_manager, mem_module);
286	
287	  return mem_module;
288	}

290	/*********************************************************************
291	 * WL shift register chain module organization
292	 *
293	 *                +-------+    +-------+            +-------+
294	 *    chain   --->| CCFF  |--->| CCFF  |--->... --->| CCFF  |---->chain
295	 *  input&clock   |  [0]  |    |  [1]  |            | [N-1] |     output
296	 *                +-------+    +-------+            +-------+
297	 *                    |            |      ...           | config-memory output
298	 *                    v            v                    v
299	 *                +-----------------------------------------+
300	 *                |   WL/WLRs of configurable modules       |
301	 *
302	 ********************************************************************/
303	static ModuleId build_wl_shift_register_chain_module(
304	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
305	  const std::string& module_name, const CircuitModelId& sram_model,
306	  const size_t& num_mems) {
307	  /* Get the input ports from the SRAM */
308	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_input_ports =
309	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_INPUT, true);
310	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_input_ports.size());
311	
312	  /* Get the output ports from the SRAM */
313	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_output_ports =
314	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_OUTPUT,
315	                                    true);
316	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_output_ports.size());
317	
318	  /* Get the WL ports from the SRAM */
319	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_wl_ports =
320	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_WL, true);
321	  VTR_ASSERT(1 == sram_wl_ports.size());
322	
323	  /* Get the optional WLR ports from the SRAM */
324	  std::vector<CircuitPortId> sram_wlr_ports =
325	    circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_WLR, true);
326	  VTR_ASSERT(0 == sram_wlr_ports.size() || 1 == sram_wlr_ports.size());
327	
328	  /* Create a module and add to the module manager */
329	  ModuleId mem_module = module_manager.add_module(module_name);
330	  VTR_ASSERT(true == module_manager.valid_module_id(mem_module));
331	
332	  /* Label module usage */
333	  module_manager.set_module_usage(mem_module, ModuleManager::MODULE_CONFIG);
334	
335	  /* Add an input port, which is the head of configuration chain in the module
336	   */
337	  /* TODO: restriction!!!
338	   * consider only the first input of the CCFF model as the D port,
339	   * which will be connected to the head of the chain
340	   */
341	  BasicPort chain_head_port(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME,
342	                            circuit_lib.port_size(sram_input_ports[0]));
343	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_head_port,
344	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
345	
346	  /* Add an output port, which is the tail of configuration chain in the module
347	   */
348	  /* TODO: restriction!!!
349	   * consider only the first output of the CCFF model as the Q port,
350	   * which will be connected to the tail of the chain
351	   */
352	  BasicPort chain_tail_port(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_TAIL_NAME,
353	                            circuit_lib.port_size(sram_output_ports[0]));
354	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_tail_port,
355	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);
356	
357	  /* Add the output ports to output BL/WL signals */
358	  BasicPort chain_wl_port(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WL_OUT_NAME, num_mems);
359	  module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_wl_port,
360	                          ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);
361	
362	  /* Add the output ports to output WLR signals */
363	  if (!sram_wlr_ports.empty()) {
364	    BasicPort chain_wlr_port(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WLR_OUT_NAME, num_mems);
365	    module_manager.add_port(mem_module, chain_wlr_port,
366	                            ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);
367	  }
368	
369	  /* Find the sram module in the module manager */
370	  ModuleId sram_mem_module =
371	    module_manager.find_module(circuit_lib.model_name(sram_model));
372	
373	  /* Instanciate each submodule */
374	  for (size_t i = 0; i < num_mems; ++i) {
375	    size_t sram_mem_instance =
376	      module_manager.num_instance(mem_module, sram_mem_module);
377	    module_manager.add_child_module(mem_module, sram_mem_module);
378	    module_manager.add_configurable_child(
379	      mem_module, sram_mem_module, sram_mem_instance,
380	      ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::UNIFIED);
381	
382	    /* Build module nets to wire wl outputs of sram modules to WL outputs of
383	     * memory module */
384	    for (const auto& child_module_output_port : sram_wl_ports) {
385	      std::string chain_output_port_name =
386	        std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WL_OUT_NAME);
387	      add_module_output_nets_to_chain_mem_modules(
388	        module_manager, mem_module, chain_output_port_name, circuit_lib,
389	        child_module_output_port, sram_mem_module, i, sram_mem_instance);
390	    }
391	
392	    /* Build module nets to wire wlr outputs of sram modules to WLR outputs of
393	     * memory module */
394	    for (const auto& child_module_output_port : sram_wlr_ports) {
395	      std::string chain_output_port_name =
396	        std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WLR_OUT_NAME);
397	      add_module_output_nets_to_chain_mem_modules(
398	        module_manager, mem_module, chain_output_port_name, circuit_lib,
399	        child_module_output_port, sram_mem_module, i, sram_mem_instance);
400	    }
401	  }
402	
403	  /* Build module nets to wire the configuration chain */
404	  add_module_nets_to_ql_memory_bank_shift_register_module(
405	    module_manager, mem_module, circuit_lib, sram_input_ports[0],
406	    sram_output_ports[0], std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME),
407	    std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_TAIL_NAME));
408	
409	  /* Add global ports to the pb_module:
410	   * This is a much easier job after adding sub modules (instances),
411	   * we just need to find all the global ports from the child modules and build
412	   * a list of it
413	   */
414	  add_module_global_ports_from_child_modules(module_manager, mem_module);
415	
416	  return mem_module;
417	}
