419	/*********************************************************************
420	 * This function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks
421	 * Each configuration region has independent memory bank circuitry
422	 * - Find the number of BLs and WLs required for each region
423	 * - Create BL and WL decoders, and add them to decoder library
424	 * - Create nets to connect from top-level module inputs to inputs of decoders
425	 * - Create nets to connect from outputs of decoders to BL/WL of configurable
426	 *children
427	 *
428	 * @note this function only adds the BL configuration bus for decoders
429	 *
430	 * Detailed schematic of how memory banks are connected in the top-level:
431	 * Consider a random Region X, local BL address lines are aligned to the LSB of
432	 *the top-level BL address lines
433	 *
434	 *            top_bl_addr[N-1:0]
435	 *                 ^
436	 *                 | local_bl_addr[N-1:0]
437	 *                 |
438	 *           +-----+------------------+
439	 *           |     |                  |
440	 *           |  +-------------------+ |
441	 *           |  | Word Line Decoder | |
442	 *           |  +-------------------+ |
443	 *           |                        |
444	 *
445	 * The BL/WL decoders should have the same circuit designs no matter what region
446	 * they are placed even when the number of configuration bits are different
447	 * from one region to another!
448	 * This is designed to avoid any address collision between memory banks
449	 * since they are programmed in the same clock cycle
450	 * For example:
451	 *   - Memory Bank A has 36 memory cells.
452	 *     Its BL decoder has 3 address bit and 6 data output bit
453	 *     Its WL decoder has 3 address bit and 6 data output bit
454	 *   - Memory Bank B has 16 memory cells.
455	 *     Its BL decoder has 2 address bit and 4 data output bit
456	 *     Its WL decoder has 2 address bit and 4 data output bit
457	 *   - If we try to program the 36th memory cell in bank A
458	 *     the BL address will be 3'b110
459	 *     the WL address will be 3'b110
460	 *     the data input will be 1'b0
461	 *   - If we try to program the 4th memory cell in bank A
462	 *     the BL address will be 3'b010
463	 *     the WL address will be 3'b010
464	 *     the data input will be 1'b1
465	 *     However, in both cases, this will trigger a parasitic programming in bank
466	 *B the BL address will be 2'b10 the WL address will be 2'b10 Assume the data
467	 *input is expected to be 1'b1 for bank B but it will be overwritten to 1'b0
468	 *when programming the 36th cell in bank A!
469	 *
470	 * Detailed schematic of each memory bank:
471	 * @note The numbers are just made to show a simplified example, practical cases
472	 *are more complicated!
473	 *
474	 *                            WL_enable  WL address
475	 *                               |           |
476	 *                               v           v
477	 *                           +-----------------------------------------------+
478	 *                           |     Word Line Decoder                         |
479	 *                           +-----------------------------------------------+
480	 *               +---------+    |              |                    |
481	 *  BL           |         |    |              |                    |
482	 *  enable  ---->|         |-----------+---------------+----  ...   |------+-->
483	 *BL[0:2] |         |    |      |       |       |            |      | | |    |
484	 *v       |       v            |      v | Bit     |    |   +-------+  |
485	 *+-------+        |  +------+ BL           | Line    |    +-->| SRAM  |  +-->|
486	 *SRAM  |        +->| SRAM | address ---->| Decoder |    |   | [0:8] |  |   |
487	 *[0:5] |   ...  |  | [0:7]| |         |    |   +-------+  |   +-------+ |
488	 *+------+ |         |    |              |                    | |
489	 *|-----------+--------------+---------    | -----+--> BL[0:9] |         |    |
490	 *|       |       |            |      | |         |    |      v       |       v
491	 *|      v |         |    |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+ | |
492	 *+-->| SRAM  |  |   | SRAM  |        +->| SRAM  | |         |    |   | [0:80]|
493	 *|   | [0:63]|   ...  |  | [0:31]| |         |    |   +-------+  |   +-------+
494	 *|  +-------+ |         |    |                                   | |         |
495	 *|     ...     ...    ...            |    ... |         |    |              | |
496	 *               |         |-----------+---------------+----  ---   | -----+-->
497	 *BL[0:3] |         |    |      |       |       |            |      | | |    |
498	 *v       |       v            |      v |         |    |   +-------+  |
499	 *+-------+        |  +-------+ |         |    +-->| SRAM  |  +-->| SRAM  | +->|
500	 *SRAM  | |         |    |   |[0:5]  |  |   | [0:8] |   ...  |  | [0:2] | | | |
501	 *+-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+ BL           |         |    v v v
502	 *  data_in ---->|         |  WL[0:9]          WL[0:7]                WL[0:4]
503	 *               +---------+
504	 *
505	 **********************************************************************/
506	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_decoder_config_bus(
507	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
508	  const ModuleId& top_module, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
509	  const CircuitModelId& sram_model,
510	  const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
511	  /* Find Enable port from the top-level module */
512	  ModulePortId en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
513	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
514	  BasicPort en_port_info = module_manager.module_port(top_module, en_port);
515	
516	  /* Find data-in port from the top-level module */
517	  ModulePortId din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
518	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
519	  BasicPort din_port_info = module_manager.module_port(top_module, din_port);
520	
521	  /* Data in port should match the number of configuration regions */
522	  VTR_ASSERT(din_port_info.get_width() ==
523	             module_manager.regions(top_module).size());
524	
525	  /* Find BL and WL address port from the top-level module */
526	  ModulePortId bl_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
527	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_BL_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
528	  BasicPort bl_addr_port_info =
529	    module_manager.module_port(top_module, bl_addr_port);
530	
531	  /* Find the top-level number of BLs and WLs required to access each memory bit
532	   */
533	  size_t bl_addr_size = bl_addr_port_info.get_width();
534	
535	  /* Each memory bank has a unified number of BL/WLs */
536	  size_t num_bls = 0;
537	  for (const auto& curr_config_bits : num_config_bits) {
538	    num_bls = std::max(num_bls, curr_config_bits.first);
539	  }
540	
541	  /* Create separated memory bank circuitry, i.e., BL/WL decoders for each
542	   * region */
543	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
544	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
545	    /**************************************************************
546	     * Add the BL decoder module
547	     * Search the decoder library
548	     * If we find one, we use the module.
549	     * Otherwise, we create one and add it to the decoder library
550	     */
551	    DecoderId bl_decoder_id =
552	      decoder_lib.find_decoder(bl_addr_size, num_bls, true, true, false, false);
553	    if (DecoderId::INVALID() == bl_decoder_id) {
554	      bl_decoder_id = decoder_lib.add_decoder(bl_addr_size, num_bls, true, true,
555	                                              false, false);
556	    }
557	    VTR_ASSERT(DecoderId::INVALID() != bl_decoder_id);
558	
559	    /* Create a module if not existed yet */
560	    std::string bl_decoder_module_name =
561	      generate_memory_decoder_with_data_in_subckt_name(bl_addr_size, num_bls);
562	    ModuleId bl_decoder_module =
563	      module_manager.find_module(bl_decoder_module_name);
564	    if (ModuleId::INVALID() == bl_decoder_module) {
565	      /* BL decoder has the same ports as the frame-based decoders
566	       * We reuse it here
567	       */
568	      bl_decoder_module = build_bl_memory_decoder_module(
569	        module_manager, decoder_lib, bl_decoder_id);
570	    }
571	    VTR_ASSERT(ModuleId::INVALID() != bl_decoder_module);
572	    size_t curr_bl_decoder_instance_id =
573	      module_manager.num_instance(top_module, bl_decoder_module);
574	    module_manager.add_child_module(top_module, bl_decoder_module, false);
575	
576	    /**************************************************************
577	     * Add module nets from the top module to BL decoder's inputs
578	     */
579	    ModulePortId bl_decoder_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
580	      bl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
581	    BasicPort bl_decoder_en_port_info =
582	      module_manager.module_port(bl_decoder_module, bl_decoder_en_port);
583	
584	    ModulePortId bl_decoder_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
585	      bl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
586	    BasicPort bl_decoder_addr_port_info =
587	      module_manager.module_port(bl_decoder_module, bl_decoder_addr_port);
588	
589	    ModulePortId bl_decoder_din_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
590	      bl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME));
591	    BasicPort bl_decoder_din_port_info =
592	      module_manager.module_port(bl_decoder_module, bl_decoder_din_port);
593	
594	    /* Data in port of the local BL decoder should always be 1 */
595	    VTR_ASSERT(1 == bl_decoder_din_port_info.get_width());
596	
597	    /* Top module Enable port -> BL Decoder Enable port */
598	    add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, en_port,
599	                        bl_decoder_module, curr_bl_decoder_instance_id,
600	                        bl_decoder_en_port);
601	
602	    /* Top module Address port -> BL Decoder Address port */
603	    add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, bl_addr_port,
604	                        bl_decoder_module, curr_bl_decoder_instance_id,
605	                        bl_decoder_addr_port);
606	
607	    /* Top module data_in port -> BL Decoder data_in port:
608	     * Note that each region has independent data_in connection from the
609	     * top-level module The pin index is the configuration region index
610	     */
611	    ModuleNetId din_net = create_module_source_pin_net(
612	      module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, din_port,
613	      din_port_info.pins()[size_t(config_region)]);
614	    VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != din_net);
615	
616	    /* Configure the net sink */
617	    module_manager.add_module_net_sink(
618	      top_module, din_net, bl_decoder_module, curr_bl_decoder_instance_id,
619	      bl_decoder_din_port, bl_decoder_din_port_info.pins()[0]);
620	
621	    /**************************************************************
622	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
623	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
624	     * for each column or row
625	     */
626	    std::pair<int, int> child_x_range =
627	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_x_range(
628	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
629	    std::map<int, size_t> num_bls_per_tile =
630	      compute_memory_bank_regional_bitline_numbers_per_tile(
631	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
632	    std::map<int, size_t> bl_start_index_per_tile =
633	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_x_range,
634	                                                             num_bls_per_tile);
635	
636	    /**************************************************************
637	     * Add nets from BL data out to each configurable child
638	     * BL data output pins are connected to the BL input pins of each PB/CB/SB
639	     * For all the PB/CB/SB in the same column, they share the same set of BLs
640	     * A quick example
641	     *
642	     *   BL[i .. i + sqrt(N)]
643	     *     |
644	     *     |    CLB[1][H]
645	     *     |   +---------+
646	     *     |   |  SRAM   |
647	     *     +-->|  [0..N] |
648	     *     |   +---------+
649	     *     |
650	     *    ...
651	     *     |    CLB[1][1]
652	     *     |   +---------+
653	     *     |   |  SRAM   |
654	     *     +-->|  [0..N] |
655	     *     |   +---------+
656	     *     |
657	     */
658	    ModulePortId bl_decoder_dout_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
659	      bl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_OUT_PORT_NAME));
660	    BasicPort bl_decoder_dout_port_info =
661	      module_manager.module_port(bl_decoder_module, bl_decoder_dout_port);
662	
663	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
664	         child_id <
665	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
666	           .size();
667	         ++child_id) {
668	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
669	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
670	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
671	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
672	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
673	
674	      size_t child_instance =
675	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
676	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
677	
678	      /* Find the BL port */
679	      ModulePortId child_bl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
680	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME));
681	      BasicPort child_bl_port_info =
682	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_bl_port);
683	
684	      size_t cur_bl_index = 0;
685	
686	      for (const size_t& sink_bl_pin : child_bl_port_info.pins()) {
687	        size_t bl_pin_id = bl_start_index_per_tile[coord.x()] + cur_bl_index;
688	        /* Find the BL decoder data index:
689	         * It should be the starting index plus an offset which is the residual
690	         * when divided by the number of BLs in this tile
691	         */
692	        VTR_ASSERT(bl_pin_id < bl_decoder_dout_port_info.pins().size());
693	
694	        /* Create net */
695	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
696	          module_manager, top_module, bl_decoder_module,
697	          curr_bl_decoder_instance_id, bl_decoder_dout_port,
698	          bl_decoder_dout_port_info.pins()[bl_pin_id]);
699	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
700	
701	        /* Add net sink */
702	        module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
703	                                           child_instance, child_bl_port,
704	                                           sink_bl_pin);
705	
706	        cur_bl_index++;
707	      }
708	    }
709	
710	    /**************************************************************
711	     * Add the BL and WL decoders to the end of configurable children list
712	     * Note: this MUST be done after adding all the module nets to other regular
713	     * configurable children
714	     */
715	    module_manager.add_configurable_child(
716	      top_module, bl_decoder_module, curr_bl_decoder_instance_id,
717	      ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::UNIFIED);
718	    module_manager.add_configurable_child_to_region(
719	      top_module, config_region, bl_decoder_module, curr_bl_decoder_instance_id,
720	      module_manager
721	          .configurable_children(top_module,
722	                                 ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
723	          .size() -
724	        1);
725	  }
726	}
727	
728	/*********************************************************************
729	 * Top-level function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks
730	 * Each configuration region has independent memory bank circuitry
731	 * - Find the number of BLs and WLs required for each region
732	 * - Create BL and WL decoders, and add them to decoder library
733	 * - Create nets to connect from top-level module inputs to inputs of decoders
734	 * - Create nets to connect from outputs of decoders to BL/WL of configurable
735	 *children
736	 *
737	 * @note this function only adds the WL configuration bus for decoders
738	 *
739	 * @note see detailed explanation on the bus connection in function
740	 *add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_decoder_config_bus()
741	 **********************************************************************/
742	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_decoder_config_bus(
743	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
744	  const ModuleId& top_module, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
745	  const CircuitModelId& sram_model,
746	  const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
747	  /* Find Enable port from the top-level module */
748	  ModulePortId en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
749	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
750	  BasicPort en_port_info = module_manager.module_port(top_module, en_port);
751	
752	  /* Find readback port from the top-level module */
753	  ModulePortId readback_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
754	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_READBACK_PORT_NAME));
755	  BasicPort readback_port_info;
756	
757	  /* Readback port if available, should be a 1-bit port */
758	  if (readback_port) {
759	    readback_port_info = module_manager.module_port(top_module, readback_port);
760	    VTR_ASSERT(readback_port_info.get_width() == 1);
761	  }
762	
763	  /* Find BL and WL address port from the top-level module */
764	  ModulePortId wl_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
765	    top_module, std::string(DECODER_WL_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
766	  BasicPort wl_addr_port_info =
767	    module_manager.module_port(top_module, wl_addr_port);
768	
769	  /* Find the top-level number of BLs and WLs required to access each memory bit
770	   */
771	  size_t wl_addr_size = wl_addr_port_info.get_width();
772	
773	  /* Each memory bank has a unified number of BL/WLs */
774	  size_t num_wls = 0;
775	  for (const auto& curr_config_bits : num_config_bits) {
776	    num_wls = std::max(num_wls, curr_config_bits.second);
777	  }
778	
779	  /* Create separated memory bank circuitry, i.e., BL/WL decoders for each
780	   * region */
781	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
782	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
783	    /**************************************************************
784	     * Add the WL decoder module
785	     * Search the decoder library
786	     * If we find one, we use the module.
787	     * Otherwise, we create one and add it to the decoder library
788	     */
789	    DecoderId wl_decoder_id =
790	      decoder_lib.find_decoder(wl_addr_size, num_wls, true, false, false,
791	                               readback_port != ModulePortId::INVALID());
792	    if (DecoderId::INVALID() == wl_decoder_id) {
793	      wl_decoder_id =
794	        decoder_lib.add_decoder(wl_addr_size, num_wls, true, false, false,
795	                                readback_port != ModulePortId::INVALID());
796	    }
797	    VTR_ASSERT(DecoderId::INVALID() != wl_decoder_id);
798	
799	    /* Create a module if not existed yet */
800	    std::string wl_decoder_module_name =
801	      generate_memory_decoder_subckt_name(wl_addr_size, num_wls);
802	    ModuleId wl_decoder_module =
803	      module_manager.find_module(wl_decoder_module_name);
804	    if (ModuleId::INVALID() == wl_decoder_module) {
805	      /* BL decoder has the same ports as the frame-based decoders
806	       * We reuse it here
807	       */
808	      wl_decoder_module = build_wl_memory_decoder_module(
809	        module_manager, decoder_lib, wl_decoder_id);
810	    }
811	    VTR_ASSERT(ModuleId::INVALID() != wl_decoder_module);
812	    size_t curr_wl_decoder_instance_id =
813	      module_manager.num_instance(top_module, wl_decoder_module);
814	    module_manager.add_child_module(top_module, wl_decoder_module, false);
815	
816	    /**************************************************************
817	     * Add module nets from the top module to WL decoder's inputs
818	     */
819	    ModulePortId wl_decoder_en_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
820	      wl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
821	    BasicPort wl_decoder_en_port_info =
822	      module_manager.module_port(wl_decoder_module, wl_decoder_en_port);
823	
824	    ModulePortId wl_decoder_addr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
825	      wl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME));
826	    BasicPort wl_decoder_addr_port_info =
827	      module_manager.module_port(wl_decoder_module, wl_decoder_addr_port);
828	
829	    ModulePortId wl_decoder_readback_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
830	      wl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_READBACK_PORT_NAME));
831	    BasicPort wl_decoder_readback_port_info;
832	    if (wl_decoder_readback_port) {
833	      wl_decoder_readback_port_info =
834	        module_manager.module_port(wl_decoder_module, wl_decoder_readback_port);
835	    }
836	
837	    /* Top module Enable port -> WL Decoder Enable port */
838	    add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, en_port,
839	                        wl_decoder_module, curr_wl_decoder_instance_id,
840	                        wl_decoder_en_port);
841	
842	    /* Top module Address port -> WL Decoder Address port */
843	    add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, wl_addr_port,
844	                        wl_decoder_module, curr_wl_decoder_instance_id,
845	                        wl_decoder_addr_port);
846	
847	    /* Top module readback port -> WL Decoder readback port */
848	    if (wl_decoder_readback_port) {
849	      add_module_bus_nets(module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0,
850	                          readback_port, wl_decoder_module,
851	                          curr_wl_decoder_instance_id,
852	                          wl_decoder_readback_port);
853	    }
854	
855	    /**************************************************************
856	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
857	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
858	     * for each column or row
859	     */
860	    std::pair<int, int> child_y_range =
861	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_y_range(
862	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
863	    std::map<int, size_t> num_wls_per_tile =
864	      compute_memory_bank_regional_wordline_numbers_per_tile(
865	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
866	    std::map<int, size_t> wl_start_index_per_tile =
867	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_y_range,
868	                                                             num_wls_per_tile);
869	
870	    /**************************************************************
871	     * Add nets from WL data out to each configurable child
872	     */
873	    ModulePortId wl_decoder_dout_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
874	      wl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_OUT_PORT_NAME));
875	    BasicPort wl_decoder_dout_port_info =
876	      module_manager.module_port(wl_decoder_module, wl_decoder_dout_port);
877	
878	    /* Note we skip the last child which is the bl decoder added */
879	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
880	         child_id <
881	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
882	           .size();
883	         ++child_id) {
884	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
885	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
886	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
887	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
888	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
889	
890	      size_t child_instance =
891	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
892	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
893	
894	      /* Find the WL port. If the child does not have WL port, bypass it. It is
895	       * usually a decoder module */
896	      ModulePortId child_wl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
897	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME));
898	      if (!child_wl_port) {
899	        continue;
900	      }
901	      BasicPort child_wl_port_info =
902	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_wl_port);
903	
904	      size_t cur_wl_index = 0;
905	
906	      for (const size_t& sink_wl_pin : child_wl_port_info.pins()) {
907	        size_t wl_pin_id = wl_start_index_per_tile[coord.y()] + cur_wl_index;
908	        VTR_ASSERT(wl_pin_id < wl_decoder_dout_port_info.pins().size());
909	
910	        /* Create net */
911	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
912	          module_manager, top_module, wl_decoder_module,
913	          curr_wl_decoder_instance_id, wl_decoder_dout_port,
914	          wl_decoder_dout_port_info.pins()[wl_pin_id]);
915	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
916	
917	        /* Add net sink */
918	        module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
919	                                           child_instance, child_wl_port,
920	                                           sink_wl_pin);
921	
922	        cur_wl_index++;
923	      }
924	    }
925	
926	    /**************************************************************
927	     * Optional: Add nets from WLR data out to each configurable child
928	     */
929	    ModulePortId wl_decoder_data_ren_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
930	      wl_decoder_module, std::string(DECODER_DATA_READ_ENABLE_PORT_NAME));
931	    BasicPort wl_decoder_data_ren_port_info;
932	    if (wl_decoder_data_ren_port) {
933	      wl_decoder_data_ren_port_info =
934	        module_manager.module_port(wl_decoder_module, wl_decoder_data_ren_port);
935	      for (size_t child_id = 0;
936	           child_id < module_manager
937	                        .region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
938	                        .size();
939	           ++child_id) {
940	        ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
941	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
942	        vtr::Point<int> coord =
943	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
944	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
945	
946	        size_t child_instance =
947	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
948	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
949	
950	        /* Find the WLR port. If the child does not have WLR port, bypass it. It
951	         * is usually a decoder module */
952	        ModulePortId child_wlr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
953	          child_module, std::string(MEMORY_WLR_PORT_NAME));
954	        if (!child_wlr_port) {
955	          continue;
956	        }
957	        BasicPort child_wlr_port_info =
958	          module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_wlr_port);
959	
960	        size_t cur_wlr_index = 0;
961	
962	        for (const size_t& sink_wlr_pin : child_wlr_port_info.pins()) {
963	          size_t wlr_pin_id =
964	            wl_start_index_per_tile[coord.y()] + cur_wlr_index;
965	          VTR_ASSERT(wlr_pin_id < wl_decoder_data_ren_port_info.pins().size());
966	
967	          /* Create net */
968	          ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
969	            module_manager, top_module, wl_decoder_module,
970	            curr_wl_decoder_instance_id, wl_decoder_data_ren_port,
971	            wl_decoder_data_ren_port_info.pins()[wlr_pin_id]);
972	          VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
973	
974	          /* Add net sink */
975	          module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
976	                                             child_instance, child_wlr_port,
977	                                             sink_wlr_pin);
978	
979	          cur_wlr_index++;
980	        }
981	      }
982	    }
983	
984	    /**************************************************************
985	     * Add the BL and WL decoders to the end of configurable children list
986	     * Note: this MUST be done after adding all the module nets to other regular
987	     * configurable children
988	     */
989	    module_manager.add_configurable_child(
990	      top_module, wl_decoder_module, curr_wl_decoder_instance_id,
991	      ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::UNIFIED);
992	    module_manager.add_configurable_child_to_region(
993	      top_module, config_region, wl_decoder_module, curr_wl_decoder_instance_id,
994	      module_manager
995	          .configurable_children(top_module,
996	                                 ModuleManager::e_config_child_type::PHYSICAL)
997	          .size() -
998	        1);
999	  }
1000	}

1002	/*********************************************************************
1003	 * This function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks using flatten BLs and
1004	 *WLs Each configuration region has independent BL/WLs
1005	 * - Find the number of BLs and WLs required for each region
1006	 * - Create nets to connect from top-level module inputs to BL/WL of
1007	 *configurable children
1008	 *
1009	 * @note this function only adds the BL configuration bus
1010	 *
1011	 * Detailed schematic of each memory bank:
1012	 * @note The numbers are just made to show a simplified example, practical cases
1013	 *are more complicated!
1014	 *
1015	 *                 BL[0:9]        BL[10:17]          BL[18:22]
1016	 *                   |              |                    |
1017	 *                   |              |                    |
1018	 *     WL[0:3]-->-----------+---------------+----  ...   |------+-->
1019	 *                   |      |       |       |            |      |
1020	 *                   |      v       |       v            |      v
1021	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +------+
1022	 *                   +-->| SRAM  |  +-->| SRAM  |        +->| SRAM |
1023	 *                   |   | [0:8] |  |   | [0:5] |   ...  |  | [0:7]|
1024	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +------+
1025	 *                   |              |                    |
1026	 *     WL[4:14]  -----------+--------------+---------    | -----+-->
1027	 *                   |      |       |       |            |      |
1028	 *                   |      v       |       v            |      v
1029	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+
1030	 *                   +-->| SRAM  |  |   | SRAM  |        +->| SRAM  |
1031	 *                   |   | [0:80]|  |   | [0:63]|   ...  |  | [0:31]|
1032	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+
1033	 *                   |                                   |
1034	 *                   |     ...     ...    ...            |    ...
1035	 *                   |              |                    |
1036	 *     WL[15:18] -----------+---------------+----  ---   | -----+-->
1037	 *                   |      |       |       |            |      |
1038	 *                   |      v       |       v            |      v
1039	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+
1040	 *                   +-->| SRAM  |  +-->| SRAM  |        +->| SRAM  |
1041	 *                   |   |[0:5]  |  |   | [0:8] |   ...  |  | [0:2] |
1042	 *                   |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+
1043	 *                   v              v                    v
1044	 *                 WL[0:9]          WL[0:7]                WL[0:4]
1045	 *
1046	 **********************************************************************/
1047	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_flatten_config_bus(
1048	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1049	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const CircuitModelId& sram_model) {
1050	  /* Create connections between BLs of top-level module and BLs of child modules
1051	   * for each region */
1052	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1053	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1054	    /**************************************************************
1055	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
1056	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
1057	     * for each column or row
1058	     */
1059	    std::pair<int, int> child_x_range =
1060	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_x_range(
1061	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
1062	    std::map<int, size_t> num_bls_per_tile =
1063	      compute_memory_bank_regional_bitline_numbers_per_tile(
1064	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
1065	    std::map<int, size_t> bl_start_index_per_tile =
1066	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_x_range,
1067	                                                             num_bls_per_tile);
1068	
1069	    /**************************************************************
1070	     * Add BL nets from top module to each configurable child
1071	     * BL pins of top module are connected to the BL input pins of each PB/CB/SB
1072	     * For all the PB/CB/SB in the same column, they share the same set of BLs
1073	     * A quick example
1074	     *
1075	     *   BL[i .. i + sqrt(N)]
1076	     *     |
1077	     *     |    CLB[1][H]
1078	     *     |   +---------+
1079	     *     |   |  SRAM   |
1080	     *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1081	     *     |   +---------+
1082	     *     |
1083	     *    ...
1084	     *     |    CLB[1][1]
1085	     *     |   +---------+
1086	     *     |   |  SRAM   |
1087	     *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1088	     *     |   +---------+
1089	     *     |
1090	     */
1091	    ModulePortId top_module_bl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1092	      top_module, generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
1093	                    std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME), config_region));
1094	    BasicPort top_module_bl_port_info =
1095	      module_manager.module_port(top_module, top_module_bl_port);
1096	
1097	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
1098	         child_id <
1099	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1100	           .size();
1101	         ++child_id) {
1102	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1103	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1104	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
1105	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
1106	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1107	
1108	      size_t child_instance =
1109	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1110	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1111	
1112	      /* Find the BL port */
1113	      ModulePortId child_bl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1114	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME));
1115	      BasicPort child_bl_port_info =
1116	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_bl_port);
1117	
1118	      size_t cur_bl_index = 0;
1119	
1120	      for (const size_t& sink_bl_pin : child_bl_port_info.pins()) {
1121	        size_t bl_pin_id = bl_start_index_per_tile[coord.x()] + cur_bl_index;
1122	        VTR_ASSERT(bl_pin_id < top_module_bl_port_info.pins().size());
1123	
1124	        /* Create net */
1125	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1126	          module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, top_module_bl_port,
1127	          top_module_bl_port_info.pins()[bl_pin_id]);
1128	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1129	
1130	        /* Add net sink */
1131	        module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
1132	                                           child_instance, child_bl_port,
1133	                                           sink_bl_pin);
1134	
1135	        cur_bl_index++;
1136	      }
1137	    }
1138	  }
1139	}

1141	/*********************************************************************
1142	 * Top-level function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks using flatten
1143	 *BL/WLs Each configuration region has independent BL/WLs
1144	 * - Find the number of BLs and WLs required for each region
1145	 * - Create nets to connect from top-level module inputs to BL/WL of
1146	 *configurable children
1147	 *
1148	 * @note this function only adds the WL configuration bus
1149	 *
1150	 * @note see detailed explanation on the bus connection in function
1151	 *add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_flatten_config_bus()
1152	 **********************************************************************/
1153	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_flatten_config_bus(
1154	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1155	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const CircuitModelId& sram_model) {
1156	  /* Create connections between WLs of top-level module and WLs of child modules
1157	   * for each region */
1158	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1159	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1160	    /**************************************************************
1161	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
1162	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
1163	     * for each column or row
1164	     */
1165	    std::pair<int, int> child_y_range =
1166	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_y_range(
1167	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
1168	    std::map<int, size_t> num_wls_per_tile =
1169	      compute_memory_bank_regional_wordline_numbers_per_tile(
1170	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
1171	    std::map<int, size_t> wl_start_index_per_tile =
1172	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_y_range,
1173	                                                             num_wls_per_tile);
1174	
1175	    /**************************************************************
1176	     * Add WL nets from top module to each configurable child
1177	     */
1178	    ModulePortId top_module_wl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1179	      top_module, generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
1180	                    std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME), config_region));
1181	    BasicPort top_module_wl_port_info =
1182	      module_manager.module_port(top_module, top_module_wl_port);
1183	
1184	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
1185	         child_id <
1186	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1187	           .size();
1188	         ++child_id) {
1189	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1190	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1191	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
1192	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
1193	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1194	
1195	      size_t child_instance =
1196	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1197	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1198	
1199	      /* Find the WL port */
1200	      ModulePortId child_wl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1201	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME));
1202	      BasicPort child_wl_port_info =
1203	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_wl_port);
1204	
1205	      size_t cur_wl_index = 0;
1206	
1207	      for (const size_t& sink_wl_pin : child_wl_port_info.pins()) {
1208	        size_t wl_pin_id = wl_start_index_per_tile[coord.y()] + cur_wl_index;
1209	        VTR_ASSERT(wl_pin_id < top_module_wl_port_info.pins().size());
1210	
1211	        /* Create net */
1212	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1213	          module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, top_module_wl_port,
1214	          top_module_wl_port_info.pins()[wl_pin_id]);
1215	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1216	
1217	        /* Add net sink */
1218	        module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
1219	                                           child_instance, child_wl_port,
1220	                                           sink_wl_pin);
1221	
1222	        cur_wl_index++;
1223	      }
1224	    }
1225	
1226	    /**************************************************************
1227	     * Optional: Add WLR nets from top module to each configurable child
1228	     */
1229	    ModulePortId top_module_wlr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1230	      top_module, generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
1231	                    std::string(MEMORY_WLR_PORT_NAME), config_region));
1232	    BasicPort top_module_wlr_port_info;
1233	    if (top_module_wlr_port) {
1234	      top_module_wlr_port_info =
1235	        module_manager.module_port(top_module, top_module_wlr_port);
1236	      for (size_t child_id = 0;
1237	           child_id < module_manager
1238	                        .region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1239	                        .size();
1240	           ++child_id) {
1241	        ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1242	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1243	        vtr::Point<int> coord =
1244	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
1245	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1246	
1247	        size_t child_instance =
1248	          module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1249	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1250	
1251	        /* Find the WL port */
1252	        ModulePortId child_wlr_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1253	          child_module, std::string(MEMORY_WLR_PORT_NAME));
1254	        BasicPort child_wlr_port_info =
1255	          module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_wlr_port);
1256	
1257	        size_t cur_wlr_index = 0;
1258	
1259	        for (const size_t& sink_wlr_pin : child_wlr_port_info.pins()) {
1260	          size_t wlr_pin_id =
1261	            wl_start_index_per_tile[coord.y()] + cur_wlr_index;
1262	          VTR_ASSERT(wlr_pin_id < top_module_wlr_port_info.pins().size());
1263	
1264	          /* Create net */
1265	          ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1266	            module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, top_module_wlr_port,
1267	            top_module_wlr_port_info.pins()[wlr_pin_id]);
1268	          VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1269	
1270	          /* Add net sink */
1271	          module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
1272	                                             child_instance, child_wlr_port,
1273	                                             sink_wlr_pin);
1274	
1275	          cur_wlr_index++;
1276	        }
1277	      }
1278	    }
1279	  }
1280	}

1282	/*********************************************************************
1283	 * This function to add nets for QuickLogic memory bank
1284	 * We build the net connects between the head ports of BL shift register banks
1285	 * and the head ports of top-level module
1286	 **********************************************************************/
1287	static void
1288	add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_bank_heads(
1289	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1290	  const MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& sr_banks) {
1291	  std::string head_port_name(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME);
1292	
1293	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1294	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1295	    ModulePortId sr_head_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1296	      top_module,
1297	      generate_regional_blwl_port_name(head_port_name, config_region));
1298	    BasicPort sr_head_port_info =
1299	      module_manager.module_port(top_module, sr_head_port);
1300	
1301	    /* Iterate over each shift register banks */
1302	    for (const auto& bank : sr_banks.bl_banks(config_region)) {
1303	      /* Get the module and instance ids */
1304	      ModuleId sr_bank_module =
1305	        sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_module(config_region, bank);
1306	      size_t sr_bank_instance =
1307	        sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_instance(config_region, bank);
1308	
1309	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_module);
1310	
1311	      ModulePortId sr_module_head_port =
1312	        module_manager.find_module_port(sr_bank_module, head_port_name);
1313	      BasicPort sr_module_head_port_info =
1314	        module_manager.module_port(sr_bank_module, sr_module_head_port);
1315	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_module_head_port_info.get_width() == 1);
1316	      for (size_t ipin = 0; ipin < sr_module_head_port_info.pins().size();
1317	           ++ipin) {
1318	        /* Create net */
1319	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1320	          module_manager, top_module, top_module, 0, sr_head_port,
1321	          sr_head_port_info.pins()[size_t(bank)]);
1322	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1323	
1324	        /* Add net sink */
1325	        module_manager.add_module_net_sink(
1326	          top_module, net, sr_bank_module, sr_bank_instance,
1327	          sr_module_head_port, sr_module_head_port_info.pins()[ipin]);
1328	      }
1329	    }
1330	  }
1331	}

1482	/**************************************************************
1483	 * Add BL/WL nets from shift register module to each configurable child
1484	 * BL pins of shift register module are connected to the BL input pins of each
1485	 * PB/CB/SB For all the PB/CB/SB in the same column, they share the same set of
1486	 * BLs A quick example
1487	 *
1488	 *  +-----------------------+
1489	 *  |  Shift register chain |
1490	 *  +-----------------------+
1491	 *    BL[i .. i + sqrt(N)]
1492	 *     |
1493	 *     |    CLB[1][H]
1494	 *     |   +---------+
1495	 *     |   |  SRAM   |
1496	 *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1497	 *     |   +---------+
1498	 *     |
1499	 *    ...
1500	 *     |    CLB[1][1]
1501	 *     |   +---------+
1502	 *     |   |  SRAM   |
1503	 *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1504	 *     |   +---------+
1505	 *     |
1506	 * @note optional BL/WL is applicable to WLR, which may not always exist
1507	 */
1508	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_bank_bls(
1509	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1510	  const MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& sr_banks,
1511	  const std::string sr_blwl_port_name, const std::string& child_blwl_port_name,
1512	  const bool& optional_blwl = false) {
1513	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1514	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1515	    /* Iterate over each shift register banks */
1516	    for (const auto& bank : sr_banks.bl_banks(config_region)) {
1517	      /* Get the module and instance ids */
1518	      ModuleId sr_bank_module =
1519	        sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_module(config_region, bank);
1520	      size_t sr_bank_instance =
1521	        sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_instance(config_region, bank);
1522	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_module);
1523	
1524	      ModulePortId sr_module_blwl_port =
1525	        module_manager.find_module_port(sr_bank_module, sr_blwl_port_name);
1526	      if (!sr_module_blwl_port && optional_blwl) {
1527	        continue;
1528	      }
1529	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_module_blwl_port);
1530	      BasicPort sr_module_blwl_port_info =
1531	        module_manager.module_port(sr_bank_module, sr_module_blwl_port);
1532	
1533	      for (const BasicPort& src_port :
1534	           sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_source_ports(config_region, bank)) {
1535	        VTR_ASSERT(1 == src_port.get_width());
1536	        /* Create net */
1537	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1538	          module_manager, top_module, sr_bank_module, sr_bank_instance,
1539	          sr_module_blwl_port, src_port.pins()[0]);
1540	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1541	
1542	        for (size_t ichild = 0;
1543	             ichild < sr_banks
1544	                        .bl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_ids(config_region,
1545	                                                               bank, src_port)
1546	                        .size();
1547	             ++ichild) {
1548	          size_t child_id = sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_ids(
1549	            config_region, bank, src_port)[ichild];
1550	          ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1551	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1552	          size_t child_instance =
1553	            module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1554	              top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1555	
1556	          /* Find the BL port */
1557	          ModulePortId child_blwl_port =
1558	            module_manager.find_module_port(child_module, child_blwl_port_name);
1559	          BasicPort child_blwl_port_info =
1560	            module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_blwl_port);
1561	
1562	          /* Add net sink */
1563	          size_t sink_child_pin_id =
1564	            sr_banks.bl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_pin_ids(
1565	              config_region, bank, src_port)[ichild];
1566	          module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
1567	                                             child_instance, child_blwl_port,
1568	                                             sink_child_pin_id);
1569	        }
1570	      }
1571	    }
1572	  }
1573	}
1574	
1575	/**************************************************************
1576	 * Add BL/WL nets from shift register module to each configurable child
1577	 * BL pins of shift register module are connected to the BL input pins of each
1578	 * PB/CB/SB For all the PB/CB/SB in the same column, they share the same set of
1579	 * BLs A quick example
1580	 *
1581	 *  +-----------------------+
1582	 *  |  Shift register chain |
1583	 *  +-----------------------+
1584	 *    BL[i .. i + sqrt(N)]
1585	 *     |
1586	 *     |    CLB[1][H]
1587	 *     |   +---------+
1588	 *     |   |  SRAM   |
1589	 *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1590	 *     |   +---------+
1591	 *     |
1592	 *    ...
1593	 *     |    CLB[1][1]
1594	 *     |   +---------+
1595	 *     |   |  SRAM   |
1596	 *     +-->|  [0..N] |
1597	 *     |   +---------+
1598	 *     |
1599	 * @note optional BL/WL is applicable to WLR, which may not always exist
1600	 */
1601	static void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_bank_wls(
1602	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& top_module,
1603	  const MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& sr_banks,
1604	  const std::string sr_blwl_port_name, const std::string& child_blwl_port_name,
1605	  const bool& optional_blwl = false) {
1606	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1607	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1608	    /* Iterate over each shift register banks */
1609	    for (const auto& bank : sr_banks.wl_banks(config_region)) {
1610	      /* Get the module and instance ids */
1611	      ModuleId sr_bank_module =
1612	        sr_banks.wl_shift_register_bank_module(config_region, bank);
1613	      size_t sr_bank_instance =
1614	        sr_banks.wl_shift_register_bank_instance(config_region, bank);
1615	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_module);
1616	
1617	      ModulePortId sr_module_blwl_port =
1618	        module_manager.find_module_port(sr_bank_module, sr_blwl_port_name);
1619	      if (!sr_module_blwl_port && optional_blwl) {
1620	        continue;
1621	      }
1622	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_module_blwl_port);
1623	      BasicPort sr_module_blwl_port_info =
1624	        module_manager.module_port(sr_bank_module, sr_module_blwl_port);
1625	
1626	      for (const BasicPort& src_port :
1627	           sr_banks.wl_shift_register_bank_source_ports(config_region, bank)) {
1628	        VTR_ASSERT(1 == src_port.get_width());
1629	        /* Create net */
1630	        ModuleNetId net = create_module_source_pin_net(
1631	          module_manager, top_module, sr_bank_module, sr_bank_instance,
1632	          sr_module_blwl_port, src_port.pins()[0]);
1633	        VTR_ASSERT(ModuleNetId::INVALID() != net);
1634	
1635	        for (size_t ichild = 0;
1636	             ichild < sr_banks
1637	                        .wl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_ids(config_region,
1638	                                                               bank, src_port)
1639	                        .size();
1640	             ++ichild) {
1641	          size_t child_id = sr_banks.wl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_ids(
1642	            config_region, bank, src_port)[ichild];
1643	          ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1644	            top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1645	          size_t child_instance =
1646	            module_manager.region_configurable_child_instances(
1647	              top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1648	
1649	          /* Find the BL port */
1650	          ModulePortId child_blwl_port =
1651	            module_manager.find_module_port(child_module, child_blwl_port_name);
1652	          BasicPort child_blwl_port_info =
1653	            module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_blwl_port);
1654	
1655	          /* Add net sink */
1656	          size_t sink_child_pin_id =
1657	            sr_banks.wl_shift_register_bank_sink_child_pin_ids(
1658	              config_region, bank, src_port)[ichild];
1659	          module_manager.add_module_net_sink(top_module, net, child_module,
1660	                                             child_instance, child_blwl_port,
1661	                                             sink_child_pin_id);
1662	        }
1663	      }
1664	    }
1665	  }
1666	}
1667	
1668	/*********************************************************************
1669	 * This function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks using shift registers
1670	 *to manipulate BL/WLs Each configuration region has independent BL/WL shift
1671	 *register banks
1672	 * - Find the number of BLs and WLs required for each region
1673	 * - Find the number of BL and WL shift register chains required for each region
1674	 * - Create the module of shift register chain for each unique size
1675	 * - Create nets to connect from top-level module inputs to BL/WL shift register
1676	 *chains
1677	 * - Create nets to connect from BL/WL shift register chains to BL/WL of
1678	 *configurable children
1679	 *
1680	 * @note this function only adds the BL protocol
1681	 *
1682	 * Detailed schematic of each memory bank:
1683	 * @note The numbers are just made to show a simplified example, practical cases
1684	 *are more complicated!
1685	 *
1686	 *                                  sr_clk               sr_head     sr_tail
1687	 *                                    |                   |             ^
1688	 *                                    v                   v             |
1689	 *                           +-------------------------------------------------+
1690	 *                           |         Bit Line shift register chains          |
1691	 *                           +-------------------------------------------------+
1692	 *                               |              |                    |
1693	 *    +---------+              BL[0:9]        BL[10:17]          BL[18:22]
1694	 *    |         |                |              |                    |
1695	 *    |         |                |              |                    |
1696	 *    | Word    |--WL[0:3]-->-----------+---------------+----  ...   |------+-->
1697	 *    |         |                |      |       |       |            |      |
1698	 *    | Line    |                |      v       |       v            |      v
1699	 *    |         |                |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +------+
1700	 *    | shift   |                +-->| SRAM  |  +-->| SRAM  |        +->| SRAM |
1701	 *    |         |                |   | [0:8] |  |   | [0:5] |   ...  |  | [0:7]|
1702	 *    | register|                |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +------+
1703	 *    |         |                |              |                    |
1704	 *    | chains  |--WL[4:14]  -----------+--------------+---------    | -----+-->
1705	 *    |         |                |      |       |       |            |      |
1706	 *    |         |                |      v       |       v            |      v
1707	 *    |         |                |   +-------+  |   +-------+        | +-------+
1708	 *    |         |                +-->| SRAM  |  |   | SRAM  |        +->| SRAM |
1709	 *    |         |                |   | [0:80]|  |   | [0:63]|   ...  |  |
1710	 *[0:31]| |         |                |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |
1711	 *+-------+ |         |                |                                   | |
1712	 *|                |     ...     ...    ...            |    ... |         | | |
1713	 *| |         |--WL[15:18] -----------+---------------+----  ---   | -----+-->
1714	 *    |         |                |      |       |       |            |      |
1715	 *    |         |                |      v       |       v            |      v
1716	 *    +---------+                |   +-------+  |   +-------+        | +-------+
1717	 *                               +-->| SRAM  |  +-->| SRAM  |        +->| SRAM |
1718	 *                               |   |[0:5]  |  |   | [0:8] |   ...  |  | [0:2]
1719	 *| |   +-------+  |   +-------+        |  +-------+ v              v v WL[0:9]
1720	 *WL[0:7]                WL[0:4]
1721	 *
1722	 **********************************************************************/
1723	static void
1724	add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_config_bus(
1725	  ModuleManager& module_manager, MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& sr_banks,
1726	  const ModuleId& top_module, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
1727	  const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol) {
1728	  CircuitModelId sram_model = config_protocol.memory_model();
1729	  CircuitModelId bl_memory_model = config_protocol.bl_memory_model();
1730	  /* Find out the unique shift register chain sizes */
1731	  std::vector<size_t> unique_sr_sizes = sr_banks.bl_bank_unique_sizes();
1732	
1733	  /* Build submodules for shift register chains */
1734	  for (const size_t& sr_size : unique_sr_sizes) {
1735	    std::string sr_module_name = generate_bl_shift_register_module_name(
1736	      circuit_lib.model_name(bl_memory_model), sr_size);
1737	    build_bl_shift_register_chain_module(
1738	      module_manager, circuit_lib, sr_module_name, bl_memory_model, sr_size);
1739	  }
1740	
1741	  /* Instanciate the shift register chains in the top-level module */
1742	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1743	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1744	    for (const FabricBitLineBankId& sr_bank :
1745	         sr_banks.bl_banks(config_region)) {
1746	      size_t bl_bank_size = sr_banks.bl_bank_size(config_region, sr_bank);
1747	      std::string sr_module_name = generate_bl_shift_register_module_name(
1748	        circuit_lib.model_name(bl_memory_model), bl_bank_size);
1749	      ModuleId sr_bank_module = module_manager.find_module(sr_module_name);
1750	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_module);
1751	
1752	      size_t cur_inst = module_manager.num_instance(top_module, sr_bank_module);
1753	      module_manager.add_child_module(top_module, sr_bank_module, false);
1754	
1755	      sr_banks.link_bl_shift_register_bank_to_module(config_region, sr_bank,
1756	                                                     sr_bank_module);
1757	      sr_banks.link_bl_shift_register_bank_to_instance(config_region, sr_bank,
1758	                                                       cur_inst);
1759	    }
1760	  }
1761	
1762	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1763	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1764	    /**************************************************************
1765	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
1766	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
1767	     * for each column or row
1768	     */
1769	    std::pair<int, int> child_x_range =
1770	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_x_range(
1771	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
1772	    std::map<int, size_t> num_bls_per_tile =
1773	      compute_memory_bank_regional_bitline_numbers_per_tile(
1774	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
1775	    std::map<int, size_t> bl_start_index_per_tile =
1776	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_x_range,
1777	                                                             num_bls_per_tile);
1778	
1779	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
1780	         child_id <
1781	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1782	           .size();
1783	         ++child_id) {
1784	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1785	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1786	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
1787	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
1788	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1789	
1790	      /* Find the BL port */
1791	      ModulePortId child_bl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1792	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME));
1793	      BasicPort child_bl_port_info =
1794	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_bl_port);
1795	
1796	      size_t cur_bl_index = 0;
1797	
1798	      for (const size_t& sink_bl_pin : child_bl_port_info.pins()) {
1799	        /* Find the shift register bank id for the driving BL port */
1800	        size_t bl_pin_id = bl_start_index_per_tile[coord.x()] + cur_bl_index;
1801	        BasicPort src_bl_port(std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME), bl_pin_id,
1802	                              bl_pin_id);
1803	        FabricBitLineBankId sr_bank =
1804	          sr_banks.find_bl_shift_register_bank_id(config_region, src_bl_port);
1805	        BasicPort sr_bank_port = sr_banks.find_bl_shift_register_bank_data_port(
1806	          config_region, src_bl_port);
1807	        VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_port.is_valid());
1808	
1809	        sr_banks.add_bl_shift_register_bank_sink_node(
1810	          config_region, sr_bank, sr_bank_port, child_id, sink_bl_pin);
1811	
1812	        cur_bl_index++;
1813	      }
1814	    }
1815	  }
1816	
1817	  /* Create connections between top-level module and the BL shift register banks
1818	   * - Connect the head port from top-level module to each shift register bank
1819	   * - Connect the tail port from each shift register bank to top-level module
1820	   */
1821	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_bank_heads(
1822	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks);
1823	
1824	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_bank_tails(
1825	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks);
1826	
1827	  /* Create connections between BLs of top-level module and BLs of child modules
1828	   * for each region */
1829	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_bank_bls(
1830	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks,
1831	    std::string(BL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_BL_OUT_NAME),
1832	    std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME));
1833	}
1834	
1835	/*********************************************************************
1836	 * Top-level function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks using shift
1837	 *registers to control BL/WLs
1838	 *
1839	 * @note this function only adds the WL configuration bus
1840	 *
1841	 * @note see detailed explanation on the bus connection in function
1842	 *add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_bl_shift_register_config_bus()
1843	 **********************************************************************/
1844	static void
1845	add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_config_bus(
1846	  ModuleManager& module_manager, MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& sr_banks,
1847	  const ModuleId& top_module, const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib,
1848	  const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol) {
1849	  CircuitModelId sram_model = config_protocol.memory_model();
1850	  CircuitModelId wl_memory_model = config_protocol.wl_memory_model();
1851	  /* Find out the unique shift register chain sizes */
1852	  std::vector<size_t> unique_sr_sizes = sr_banks.wl_bank_unique_sizes();
1853	
1854	  /* Build submodules for shift register chains */
1855	  for (const size_t& sr_size : unique_sr_sizes) {
1856	    std::string sr_module_name = generate_wl_shift_register_module_name(
1857	      circuit_lib.model_name(wl_memory_model), sr_size);
1858	    build_wl_shift_register_chain_module(
1859	      module_manager, circuit_lib, sr_module_name, wl_memory_model, sr_size);
1860	  }
1861	
1862	  /* Instanciate the shift register chains in the top-level module */
1863	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1864	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1865	    for (const FabricWordLineBankId& sr_bank :
1866	         sr_banks.wl_banks(config_region)) {
1867	      size_t wl_bank_size = sr_banks.wl_bank_size(config_region, sr_bank);
1868	      std::string sr_module_name = generate_wl_shift_register_module_name(
1869	        circuit_lib.model_name(wl_memory_model), wl_bank_size);
1870	      ModuleId sr_bank_module = module_manager.find_module(sr_module_name);
1871	      VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_module);
1872	
1873	      size_t cur_inst = module_manager.num_instance(top_module, sr_bank_module);
1874	      module_manager.add_child_module(top_module, sr_bank_module, false);
1875	
1876	      sr_banks.link_wl_shift_register_bank_to_module(config_region, sr_bank,
1877	                                                     sr_bank_module);
1878	      sr_banks.link_wl_shift_register_bank_to_instance(config_region, sr_bank,
1879	                                                       cur_inst);
1880	    }
1881	  }
1882	
1883	  for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
1884	       module_manager.regions(top_module)) {
1885	    /**************************************************************
1886	     * Precompute the BLs and WLs distribution across the FPGA fabric
1887	     * The distribution is a matrix which contains the starting index of BL/WL
1888	     * for each column or row
1889	     */
1890	    std::pair<int, int> child_y_range =
1891	      compute_memory_bank_regional_configurable_child_y_range(
1892	        module_manager, top_module, config_region);
1893	    std::map<int, size_t> num_wls_per_tile =
1894	      compute_memory_bank_regional_wordline_numbers_per_tile(
1895	        module_manager, top_module, config_region, circuit_lib, sram_model);
1896	    std::map<int, size_t> wl_start_index_per_tile =
1897	      compute_memory_bank_regional_blwl_start_index_per_tile(child_y_range,
1898	                                                             num_wls_per_tile);
1899	
1900	    for (size_t child_id = 0;
1901	         child_id <
1902	         module_manager.region_configurable_children(top_module, config_region)
1903	           .size();
1904	         ++child_id) {
1905	      ModuleId child_module = module_manager.region_configurable_children(
1906	        top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1907	      vtr::Point<int> coord =
1908	        module_manager.region_configurable_child_coordinates(
1909	          top_module, config_region)[child_id];
1910	
1911	      size_t cur_wl_index = 0;
1912	
1913	      /* Find the WL port */
1914	      ModulePortId child_wl_port = module_manager.find_module_port(
1915	        child_module, std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME));
1916	      BasicPort child_wl_port_info =
1917	        module_manager.module_port(child_module, child_wl_port);
1918	
1919	      for (const size_t& sink_wl_pin : child_wl_port_info.pins()) {
1920	        size_t wl_pin_id = wl_start_index_per_tile[coord.y()] + cur_wl_index;
1921	        BasicPort src_wl_port(std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME), wl_pin_id,
1922	                              wl_pin_id);
1923	
1924	        FabricWordLineBankId sr_bank =
1925	          sr_banks.find_wl_shift_register_bank_id(config_region, src_wl_port);
1926	        BasicPort sr_bank_port = sr_banks.find_wl_shift_register_bank_data_port(
1927	          config_region, src_wl_port);
1928	        VTR_ASSERT(sr_bank_port.is_valid());
1929	
1930	        sr_banks.add_wl_shift_register_bank_sink_node(
1931	          config_region, sr_bank, sr_bank_port, child_id, sink_wl_pin);
1932	
1933	        cur_wl_index++;
1934	      }
1935	    }
1936	  }
1937	
1938	  /* Create connections between top-level module and the BL shift register banks
1939	   * - Connect the head port from top-level module to each shift register bank
1940	   * - Connect the tail port from each shift register bank to top-level module
1941	   */
1942	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_bank_heads(
1943	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks);
1944	
1945	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_bank_tails(
1946	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks);
1947	
1948	  /* Create connections between BLs of top-level module and BLs of child modules
1949	   * for each region */
1950	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_bank_wls(
1951	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks,
1952	    std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WL_OUT_NAME),
1953	    std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME));
1954	  add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_wl_shift_register_bank_wls(
1955	    module_manager, top_module, sr_banks,
1956	    std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_WLR_OUT_NAME),
1957	    std::string(MEMORY_WLR_PORT_NAME), true);
1958	}

1960	/*********************************************************************
1961	 * Top-level function to add nets for quicklogic memory banks
1962	 * - Each configuration region has independent memory bank circuitry
1963	 * - BL and WL may have different circuitry and wire connection, e.g., decoder,
1964	 *flatten or shift-registers
1965	 * - BL control circuitry
1966	 *   - Decoder: Add a BL decoder; Connect enable, address and data-in (din)
1967	 *between top-level and decoders; Connect data ports between between the decoder
1968	 *and configurable child modules
1969	 *   - Flatten: Connect BLs between the top-level port and configurable child
1970	 *modules
1971	 *   - TODO: Shift registers: add blocks of shift register chain (could be
1972	 *multi-head); Connect shift register outputs to configurable child modules
1973	 *
1974	 * - WL control circuitry
1975	 *   - Decoder: Add a WL decoder; Connect address ports between top-level and
1976	 *decoders; Connect data ports between the decoder and configurable child
1977	 *modules
1978	 *   - Flatten: Connect BLs between the top-level port and configurable child
1979	 *modules
1980	 *   - TODO: Shift registers: add blocks of shift register chain (could be
1981	 *multi-head); Connect shift register outputs to configurable child modules
1982	 ********************************************************************/
1983	void add_top_module_nets_cmos_ql_memory_bank_config_bus(
1984	  ModuleManager& module_manager, DecoderLibrary& decoder_lib,
1985	  MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& blwl_sr_banks, const ModuleId& top_module,
1986	  const CircuitLibrary& circuit_lib, const ConfigProtocol& config_protocol,
1987	  const TopModuleNumConfigBits& num_config_bits) {
1988	  VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(CONFIG_MEM_QL_MEMORY_BANK == config_protocol.type());

2070	  ModuleManager& module_manager, const ModuleId& module_id,

2072	  const MemoryBankShiftRegisterBanks& blwl_sr_banks,

2078	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_DECODER: {
2079	      /* Add enable signals */

2081	      module_manager.add_port(module_id, en_port,

2091	      }

2093	                             bl_addr_size);

2095	                              ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2096	
2097	      /* Data input should be dependent on the number of configuration regions*/
2098	      BasicPort din_port(std::string(DECODER_DATA_IN_PORT_NAME),
2099	                         config_protocol.num_regions());
2100	      module_manager.add_port(module_id, din_port,
2101	                              ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2102	      break;
2103	    }
2104	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_FLATTEN: {
2105	      /* Each region will have independent BLs */
2106	      for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
2107	           module_manager.regions(module_id)) {
2108	        size_t bl_size = num_config_bits[config_region].first;
2109	        BasicPort bl_port(generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
2110	                            std::string(MEMORY_BL_PORT_NAME), config_region),
2111	                          bl_size);

2113	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2114	      }
2115	      break;
2116	    }
2117	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_SHIFT_REGISTER: {
2118	      /* Each region will have independent shift register banks */
2119	      for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
2120	           module_manager.regions(module_id)) {
2121	        size_t num_heads = blwl_sr_banks.bl_banks(config_region).size();
2122	        BasicPort blsr_head_port(
2123	          generate_regional_blwl_port_name(

2125	          num_heads);

2127	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);

2133	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_OUTPUT_PORT);

2139	      exit(1);
2140	    }
2141	  }
2142	
2143	  switch (config_protocol.wl_protocol_type()) {
2144	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_DECODER: {
2145	      /* WL address size is the largest among all the regions */
2146	      size_t wl_addr_size = 0;
2147	      for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
2148	           module_manager.regions(module_id)) {
2149	        wl_addr_size =
2150	          std::max(wl_addr_size, find_mux_local_decoder_addr_size(
2151	                                   num_config_bits[config_region].second));

2153	      BasicPort wl_addr_port(std::string(DECODER_WL_ADDRESS_PORT_NAME),
2154	                             wl_addr_size);

2156	                              ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2157	
2158	      /* Optional: If we have WLR port, we should add a read-back port */
2159	      if (!circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_WLR)
2160	             .empty()) {
2161	        BasicPort readback_port(std::string(DECODER_READBACK_PORT_NAME),
2162	                                config_protocol.num_regions());

2164	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2165	      }
2166	      break;
2167	    }
2168	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_FLATTEN: {
2169	      /* Each region will have independent WLs */
2170	      for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
2171	           module_manager.regions(module_id)) {
2172	        size_t wl_size = num_config_bits[config_region].second;
2173	        BasicPort wl_port(generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
2174	                            std::string(MEMORY_WL_PORT_NAME), config_region),

2177	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2178	
2179	        /* Optional: If we have WLR port, we should add a read-back port */
2180	        if (!circuit_lib.model_ports_by_type(sram_model, CIRCUIT_MODEL_PORT_WLR)
2181	               .empty()) {
2182	          BasicPort wlr_port(
2183	            generate_regional_blwl_port_name(std::string(MEMORY_WLR_PORT_NAME),
2184	                                             config_region),

2187	                                  ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2188	        }
2189	      }
2190	      break;
2191	    }
2192	    case BLWL_PROTOCOL_SHIFT_REGISTER: {
2193	      /* Each region will have independent shift register banks */
2194	      for (const ConfigRegionId& config_region :
2195	           module_manager.regions(module_id)) {
2196	        size_t num_heads = blwl_sr_banks.wl_banks(config_region).size();
2197	        BasicPort wlsr_head_port(
2198	          generate_regional_blwl_port_name(
2199	            std::string(WL_SHIFT_REGISTER_CHAIN_HEAD_NAME), config_region),
2200	          num_heads);
2201	        module_manager.add_port(module_id, wlsr_head_port,
2202	                                ModuleManager::MODULE_INPUT_PORT);
2203	        BasicPort wlsr_tail_port(
2204	          generate_regional_blwl_port_name(

2209	      }
2210	      break;
2211	    }
2212	    default: {

2216	  }
